Cozmic Ray–Danger (Accapella) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1344, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Marc-Johnson-and-Richard-Toomz/", "title": "Marc Johnson & Richard Toomz", "body": "Dave Owens” DJ career took off in the early 2000s, and he has DJed at some of the club scene”s most iconic venues, including Insomniacz, Housework, Insekt, Byte, Ultim-8, Incisions, Hard Up North, Out of Order, Toast, Housewives Choice, and Forbidden. He was also the resident DJ at Manchester’s PureFilth. Dave’s production work is known for its hard-leaning sound in dance music, and he has released works on the hard house and NRG labels that represent the scene. He also works closely with Nick Denton and helps develop Toolbox Music, as well as leading sub-labels Toolbox Recordings, Hammerheads and Turtle Dog Digital. Tracklist A. Marc Johnson & Richard Toomz–Escapology AA. Dave Owens–Sour Cream & Chive Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1345, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Mahavishnu-Orchestra-Birds-Of-Fire/", "title": "Mahavishnu Orchestra – Birds Of Fire", "body": "Mahavishnu Orchestra（マハヴィシュヌ・オーケストラ）は、1970年にイギリス人ギタリストJohn McLaughlin(ジョン・マクラフリン)によって結成されたフュージョン・ジャズ・ロックの草分け的バンド。 1973年にリリースしたBirds Of Fire(火の鳥)は、Mahavishnu Orchestraの２作目で、ジャズロックとしては異例の世界的ヒットとなった。 この時期の参加メンバーは、ジョン・マクラフリン(ギター)、ジェリー・グッドマン(ヴァイオリン)、ヤン・ハマー(キーボード)、リック・レアード(ベース)、ビリー・コブハム(ドラムス)。 Tracklist A1. Birds Of Fire A2. Miles Beyond (Miles Davis) A3. Celestial Terrestrial Commuters A4. Sapphire Bullet Of Pure Love A5. Thousand Island Park A6. Hope B1. One Word B2. Sanctuary B3. Open Country Joy B4. Resolution メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1346, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Mahavishnu-Orchestra-Between-Nothingness-and-Eternity/", "title": "Mahavishnu Orchestra – Between Nothingness & Eternity", "body": "Between Nothingness & Eternity, released in 1973, was the Mahavishnu Orchestra’s first live album. This album was the last with original members, as the band disbanded in December 1973. Participating members at this time were John McLaughlin (guitar), Jerry Goodman (violin), Jan Hammer (keyboards), Rick Laird (bass), and Billy Cobham (drums). Tracklist A1. Trilogy 悲の3部曲 ・The Sunlit Path 輝ける径 ・La Mere De La Mer 海の聖母 ・Tomorrow's Story Not The Same 永遠伝説 A2. Sister Andrea シスター・アンドレア B. Dream ドリーム Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1347, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Logic-System-Logic/", "title": "Logic System – Logic", "body": "This album includes “Clash”, which was also used in DJ Harvey’s mix “Sarcastic Study Masters”. Equipment used: Emu Synthesizer, Moog IIIC, Prophet 5, ARP Odyssey, Oberheim 8 Voices, Yamaha SS-30, Yamaha CS-10, Polymoog, Yamaha CP-80, Hohner Clavinet D-6, EMS VCS-3, Pollard Syndrum, Roland Jupiter-4, Roland Vocoder VP-330, Roland MC-8, Roland TR-808, etc. Original version from 1981 by Hideki Matsutake. Tracklist A1. Intro A2. Unit A3. Domino Dance A4. (天変地異) Convulsion Of Nature A5. XY? B1. Talk Back B2. Clash (Chinjyu Of Sun) B3. Person To Person B4. Logic Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1348, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Joey-Beltram-Game-Form/", "title": "Joey Beltram – Game Form", "body": "The first song on side B is a remix by US DJ and producer Robert Armani. The second song on the B-side is a remix by Mike Dearborn, a Chicago native and owner of Majesty Recordings. Joy Beltrame is widely recognized as an early innovator in underground dance music. He started working as a DJ as a hobby in 1983, when he was 12 years old, primarily playing early electro and hip-hop. He turned to house music in 1985, the same year that the first wave of Chicago house arrived in New York, and in 1989, while still working as a courier, he began releasing some of his early work on several small record labels in New York. A year later, they caught the attention of Belgium’s R&S Records, who released their first major record, Energy Flash, by mid-1990, with a string of equally impressive releases to follow. Throughout the ’90s, he continued to create timeless music on the cutting edge label of the time. In 1999, he founded his own label, STX Records, which currently records with both JB³ and Joey Beltram. Tracklist A. Game Form B1. Game Form (Robert Armani Remix) B2. Game Form (Mike Dearborn Remix) Purchase..." }, { "id": 1349, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Jeff-Mills-Very-EP/", "title": "Jeff Mills – Very EP", "body": "This EP is the very heart of Detroit underground music and one of the best warm-up techno records. The unique worldview that interweaves a dark atmosphere and experimental elements can be said to be unique to Jeff Mills. Tracklist A1. Cobolt A2. Untitled B1. Cometh B2. Untitled B3. Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1350, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Jeff-Mills-Lifelike-E.P/", "title": "Jeff Mills – Lifelike E.P", "body": "“Condor To Mallorca” by Jeff Mills, as the title suggests, is a track with a mystical trip feel, starting with inspired keyboard sounds backed by a calypso-like rhythm program that converges with a kick drum. The track then takes on a more ominous aspect when the string elements come in. This EP is a very strong opener with its disturbing musical themes, and “Time After Space” has a cosmic feel. “Detached” is probably one of his best works. “Black Avenger” draws listeners in with its percussive frenzy and hard keys. A must-have for any Jeff Mills fan, this is a special record that covers many of the wide-ranging themes of Jeff Mills’ work, while still expressing the unique and powerful results of each individual song. Tracklist A1. Condor To Mallorca A2. Time After Space B1. Detached B2. Black Avenger Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1351, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Jeff-Mills-Skin-Deep-EP/", "title": "Jeff Mills – Skin Deep EP", "body": "“Call Of The Wild” samples the percussion break of “Get on the floor” from Michael Jackson’s 1979 album “Off The Wall”. A powerful and funky track that is a classic techno track. It’s a great record to listen to at high volumes in a warehouse or underground club environment. Tracklist A1. Call Of The Wild A2. Skin Deep B1. L8 B2. The Hollow Men 1b. Ice Black Jackal Throwbacks 2a. Part 1 2b. Part 2 2c. Part 3 Returning To The Purity Of Current 3a. Part 1 3b. Part 2 At The Heart Of It All 4a. Part 1 4b. Started activities under the name FreeTEMPO in 2000. In 2002, she joined the Italian label IRMA RECORDS and released her first mini album ““Love Affair.’’ Since then, they have released numerous albums and singles, gaining many fans in Japan and abroad with their melodic songs and sophisticated sound. In 2010, he suspended his activities under the name FreeTEMPO, and since then has participated in various music projects. In 2021, he resumed activities under the name FreeTEMPO for the first time in 11 years. Tracklist 1. You And Me (feat.小栗栖憲英) 2. Birds (feat.arvin homa aya) 3. Flowers (feat.名取香り) 4. Mad Pierrot Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1358, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-Daybreak/", "title": "Various – Daybreak", "body": "“Daybreak” is a release from Break It Or Leave It (the breakbeat arm of Wally’s Groove World, founded in 1997 by DJ Koenie). A4’s DVL (Davy Van Laere) is also famous for his project After Hours with DJ AME. DVL is currently the most popular skateboard photographer. Tracklist A1. Lexadelic & Zenith–Timeless Hour A2. Lexadelic & Zenith–153 White A3. Lexadelic & Zenith–Comme Un Arbre A4. DVL–The Hour After B1. Lexadelic & Zenith–One Love B2. Lexadelic & Zenith–Starfly Telephone Shoe B3. DJ Serious & Zenith–Silent Lotus B4. Tracklist A1. Swan & Mouse – Cameo Appearance A2. DJ Naz –Downbeat Beltdrive B1. Jay Tripwire – Rockitt B2. DJ Naz –Breanna Got Paged Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1360, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Thompson-Twins-Sister-Of-Mercy/", "title": "Thompson Twins – Sister Of Mercy", "body": "Thompson Twins is a British pop band formed in 1977. Initially formed as a seven-piece band, in 1982 it became a three-piece band consisting of Tom Bailey, Joe Leeway, and Alana Curry. Tracklist A. Sister Of Mercy (Extended Version) B. Out Of The Gap (Extended Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1361, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Style-Council-The-Cost-Of-Loving/", "title": "The Style Council – The Cost Of Loving", "body": "The Style Council is a British band formed in late 1982 by Paul Weller, former singer and guitarist of the new wave/mod revival band the Jam, and keyboardist Mick Talbot, former member of Dexys Midnight Runners, the Bureau, and the Merton Parkas. Tracklist A1. It Didn't Matter A2. Right To Go A3. Heavens Above A4. Fairy Tales B1. Angel B2. Walking The Night B3. Waiting B4. The Cost Of Loving B5. Woman's Song Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1362, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Submission-Djs-Maringa/", "title": "Submission Dj\"s – Maringa", "body": "Submission Dj’s is a unit of Spanish DJs Juan Maria Diaz Fernandez (Submission DJ/Submission) and Daniel David Fernández (DJ Farrukeit). Released in 2009 on Tribal Spain Recordings, a sublabel of Spanish label Vendetta Records (house division of Blanco Y Negro Music S.A.). Tracklist A1. Maringa (Tribal Mix) AA1. Maringa (Tech Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1363, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Space-Circus-Funky-Caravan/", "title": "Space Circus – Funky Caravan", "body": "“Funky Caravan” is the debut album by Space Circus, a Japanese progressive rock and fusion band active in the late 1970s. Bassist Hajime Okano is a music producer and has been involved with numerous bands such as Starlin, POLYSICS, and L’Arc~en~Ciel. Tracklist A1. Alibaba (アリババ) A2. Network (ネットワーク) A3. African Reggae (アフリカン・レゲエ) B1. Funky Caravan (ファンキー・キャラバン) B2. The Way We Were (追憶) B3. Spring Wave (スプリング・ウェーブ) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1364, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Sound-Fiction-Feat.-Kate-Cameron-Alive/", "title": "Sound Fiction Feat. Kate Cameron – Alive", "body": "Sound Fiction was formed in Moscow in 2002 by Russian producers and DJs Vadim Soloviev & Dmitry Filatov. Side A is a remix by Swedish trance/progressive DJ and producer Mike Shiver. Featured Kate Cameron is a professional house and trance singer with a rich alto voice, best known for her work with Jones & Simmons, particularly as a featured artist under their aliases Space Brothers and Chakra, who have had success with crossovers such as I Am and Home. Her credits include ““P.A.S.S.I.O.N” with John of Norman Cooke/Pleased Women, ““Far From In Love” with Above & Beyond, and ““What Ya’’ with Dutch House act Signum. It was excerpted from her hard house track “You Better” under the alias Mount Rushmore Presents the Knack, which has seen chart success as a solo artist with a prominent producer, including “Got 4 Me.” Along with Angie Brown, she was a backing vocalist on many songs on Freak Power’s hit album Drive Thru Booty, including their second single release, “Rush”. She continues to tour and record with Freak Power, She has also taught at both the University of Sussex and the University of Chichester, and her notable coaching alumni include Beth Lawrie, Tom Odell..." }, { "id": 1365, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Samboa-Samboa/", "title": "Sambôa – Sambôa", "body": "This album is a reissue of Brazilian jazz duo Sambôa’s second album ““Samboa’’ released in 1983. Tracklist A1. Ze Bede A2. A Carta A3. Meu Querer A4. O Xote Do Bobo A5. Longe Da Cidade B1. Sacaneia Essa Nega B2. Casamento Na Minha Rua B3. Voltar B4. Aurora B5. Mane Cangaia Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1366, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Puppetmastaz-Bigger-The-Better/", "title": "Puppetmastaz – Bigger The Better", "body": "Puppetmastaz is a German hip-hop group formed in Berlin in 1996, consisting of members from Germany, the United States, and Canada, including Max Turner, Chilly Gonzales, Paul PM, Mister Maloke, Mocky, and Alex Tiller, who left the band in 2003. Puppetmastaz performs shows using hand puppets and is characterized by a musical style that incorporates elements of rap, funk, and electronica. Tracklist A1. Bigger The Better A2. Quick To B1. Mastaplan B2. What U Need Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1367, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Oriental-Space-My-Heart-Will-Go-On/", "title": "Oriental Space – My Heart Will Go On", "body": "Trance cover of Titanic theme song CELINE DION’s MY HEART WILL GO ON. Oriental Space is a project by Kousuke Okamoto (trance producer, DJ). Tracklist A. My Heart Will Go On B1. Peace B2. Emperortime Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1368, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Morgana-Dank-One-Another-Night-Flower/", "title": "Morgana Dank-One – Another Night Flower", "body": "This is an EP released by the label “Major Record” in 2005. Tracklist A. Morgana – Another Night (DJ Tora Vocal Mix) B. Dank-One – Flower (Original Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1369, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Lab4-None-Of-Us-Are-Saints/", "title": "Lab4 – None Of Us Are Saints", "body": "Lab4 is a UK hard dance act formed by Adam Newman & Les Elston. Side A is a remix by Japan’s leading hard dance producer and DJ Nish. “None Of Us Are Saints” was released in 2006 on avex’s sub-label Superb Trax. Tracklist A1. Perfect Drug (Nish Remix) B1. Rapture (Hybrid 2006){: .button1} B2. Perfect Drug Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1370, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Kylie-Cant-Get-You-Out-Of-My-Head/", "title": "Kylie – Can\"t Get You Out Of My Head", "body": "“Can’t Get You Out Of My Head” was released in 2001 as a single from the album Fever. The A and B sides are remixed by Tim Deluxe. The D side is a remix of Tom Stephan, also known as Superchumbo. Tracklist A01. Can't Get You Out Of My Head (Deluxe's Dirty Dub) B01. Can't Get You Out Of My Head (Deluxe's Dirty Dub Instrumental) C01. Can't Get You Out Of My Head (Plastika Mix) D01. Can't Get You Out Of My Head (Superchumbo Todo Mamado Mix) D02. It was also included in a mix by techno DJ Dave Clarke, who was active in the 90s. Tracklist A. The Samba Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1375, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Groove-Coverage-Poison/", "title": "Groove Coverage – Poison", "body": "Groove Coverage is a German Eurotrance band consisting of Axel Konrad, DJ Novus, Melanie Munch, and Verena Rehm. “Poison” is a cover song by Alice Cooper and one of Groove Coverage’s signature songs. Tracklist A1. Poison (Club Mix) A2. Poison (Tune Up! Mix) B1. Poison (Extended Mix) B2. Poison (Rock Mix) B3. Only Love Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1376, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Floppy-Sounds-Feat.-Sarah-Jones-Entertainment/", "title": "Floppy Sounds Feat. Sarah Jones – Entertainment", "body": "Rob Rives, also known as Floppy Sounds, is a producer and engineer in the US modern dance scene based in Brooklyn, NY. “Entertainment”, featuring vocalist Sarah Jones, was released in 1997 on Francois Kevorkian’s label Wave Music. A2’s co-producer is Vaughan Merrick. Tracklist A1. Entertainment (Club Mix) A2. Entertainment (Hard Mix) B1. Entertainment (Dub) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1377, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/F.R.-David-Words/", "title": "F.R. David – Words", "body": "F.R. Early members were vocalist Lyane Leigh and rapper Richard Michael Smith (aka Raz-Ma-Taz). The producer is David Brandes. “Help Me Dr. Dick” is a Eurohouse/Eurodance track released in 1996 by the dance-pop label Blow Up in Stuttgart, Germany. Tracklist A. Help Me Dr. Dick (Club Version) B. Help Me Dr. Dick (Extended Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1379, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Coo-Coo-Happy-Days/", "title": "Coo Coo – Happy Days", "body": "Coo Coo is an Italo disco pop group representing the 1980s Eurobeat high-energy scene produced by Mauro Farina, Giuliano Crivellente, and Florian Fadinger (F.C.F.). “Happy Days” is Coo Coo’s signature song, released by Flea Records in 1989. Tracklist A1. Happy Days (Happy And Lovely Version) A2. Happy Days (Extra Beat) B1. Happy Days (Fun Fun Version) B2. Happy Days (Playback Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1380, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Zeni-Geva-Desire-For-Agony/", "title": "Zeni Geva – Desire For Agony", "body": "Zenigeva’s album “Pain Oriented” was recorded and mixed at The Basement in Chicago, USA in September 1993. Zeni Geva is a Japanese band formed in Tokyo in 1987. Their musical style incorporates elements of prog rock, hardcore, heavy metal, noise rock, etc. The core members are KK.Null, known for his solo work, and Mitsuru Tabata, known for his work with Acid Mothers Temple, but the other members have changed over the years. After a long hiatus, they reunited in 2007 and resumed their activities in 2009. Tatsuya Yoshida, who was one of the original members, joined on drums. Since Mitsuru Tabata left the group in 2012, they are currently active as a duo. current members KK.Null – vocals, guitar Tatsuya Yoshida – drums, vocals Tracklist A1. Stigma = スティグマ A2. Dead Sun Rising = デッドサンライジング A3. Desire For Agony = 苦痛志向 A4. Heathern Blood = ヒーズンブラッド A5. Disgraceland = ディスグレイスランド B1. Whiteout = ホワイトアウト B2. Love Bite = ラヴバイト B3. Autopsy Love = オートプシィラブ B4. The Body = ザ ボディー Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1381, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Yellow-Magic-Orchestra-X-Multiplies/", "title": "Yellow Magic Orchestra – X∞Multiplies", "body": "YMO’s best album released in Japan by Alpha Records in September 1980. The US version is here Tracklist A1 Nice Age A2 Behind The Mask A3 Rydeen A4 Day Tripper B1 Technopolis B2 Multiplies B3 Citizens Of Science B4 Solid State Survivor Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1382, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Yellow-Magic-Orchestra-X-Multiplies-US/", "title": "Yellow Magic Orchestra – X∞Multiplies", "body": "YMO’s best album released in the United States by A&M Records in July 1980. Rydeen A2. Solid State Survivor A3. Tong Poo A4. The End Of Asia B1. Cosmic Surfin' B2. Day Tripper B3. Radio Junk B4. La Femme Chinoise B5. Back In Tokio メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1384, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-Total-House-Commitment-EP/", "title": "Various – Total House Commitment EP", "body": "A deep house/tech house compilation released by San Francisco house label THC - Total House Commitment. Pluton – Ripped Off In B-Minor Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1385, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Tommy-Brown-Feelings/", "title": "Tommy Brown – Feelings", "body": "This is Tommy Brown’s EP released in 1993 from the label “Disc-O-Very Records”. Tracklist A. Feelings (Mix Edit) B1. Feelings (Radio Edit) B2. Carillon Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1386, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Snakeman-Show-Snakeman-Show/", "title": "Snakeman Show – Snakeman Show", "body": "As a trivia about the A5 track included in the Snakeman Show “Hurry up and suck it with your mouth!” There”s a hypothetical police interrogation after Paul McCartney”s arrest. The film is based on a fictional police interrogation of Paul McCartney after his arrest in Japan, where he is repeatedly asked for his autograph. In January 1980, Paul McCartney visited Japan for a performance there. However, when he arrived at Narita Airport, he was arrested for possessing an excessive amount of marijuana. After being detained for several days, McCartney was sentenced to a fine and forced to leave the country. Tracklist A1. Snakeman Show–盗聴エディー P-1 A2. Y.M.O.–磁性紀－開け心－ A3. Snakeman Show–盗聴エディー P-2 A4. Sheena & The Rokkets–Lemon Tea A5. Snakeman Show–はい、菊地です （～7人の刑事） A6. Snakeman Show–盗聴エディー P-3 A7. The Rockats–All Thru The Nite A8. 伊武雅刀 と The Spoil–Stop The New-Wave A9. Sandii–Jimmy Mack B1. Snakeman Show–急いで口で吸え B2. The Crap Heads –黄金のクラップヘッズ B3. Snakeman Show–シンナーに気をつけろ B4. Doctor Kesseler–Me Que Me Que B5. Snakeman Show–正義と真実 B6. Klaus Nomi–Cold Song B7. ユー・アンドーミー・オルガスムス・オーケストラ –咲坂と桃内のごきげんいかが ワン・ツゥ・スリー B8. Snakeman Show–これなんですか B9. ユー・アンドーミー・オルガスムス・オーケストラ–ごきげんいかが　アゲイン Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1387, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Skinny-Puppy-12-Inch-Anthology/", "title": "Skinny Puppy – 12 Inch Anthology", "body": "Skinny Puppy is an electro-industrial band formed in 1982 by Canadian-born Kelvin Key and Kevin Ogilvie. Skinny Puppy is known as one of the founders of the industrial rock and electro-industrial genres. This album is a compilation album containing the band’s early singles and B-sides. Tracklist A1. Dig It A2. The Choke (Re-Grip) A3. Addiction (First Dose) A4. Deep Down Trauma Hounds (Remix) A5. Serpents B1. Chainsaw B2. Assimilate (R23 Mix) B3. Stairs And Flowers (Def Wish Mix) B4. Stairs And Flowers (Too Far Gone) B5. Testure (12 Inch Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1388, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Real-McCoy-Another-Night/", "title": "Real McCoy – Another Night", "body": "Real McCoy（リアル マッコイ）はドイツのユーロダンス / ポップミュージックプロジェクト。1994年リリースの「Another Night」は彼らの代表曲。 B面はArmand Van Helden（アーマンド・ヴァン・ヘルデン）のremix。 Tracklist A1. Another Night (Club Mix) A2. Another Night (House Mix) B1. Another Night (Armand's Nightmare Mix) B2. Another Night (Armand's New School Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1389, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Quietman-Plastic-Gourd-Tranquil/", "title": "Quietman – Plastic Gourd Tranquil", "body": "“Quietman – Plastic Gourd / Tranquil” is an acid trance piece released in 1994 by Platipus, a long-established UK trance/techno label. Quietma is a project by trance producers Laurence Elliot-Potter and Wilf Frost. The B-side is a REMIX by Simon Berry’s alias Art Of Trance. Tracklist A. Plastic Gourd AA. Tranquil (Remix By The Art Of Trance) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1390, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Q-ic-And-Stephenson-In-Stereo-EP/", "title": "Q-ic And Stephenson – In Stereo EP", "body": "Q-ic (Luc Byltiauw) is a Belgian DJ and music producer who is also known as the driving force behind Creation Tecnologiq, which created the Antwerp techno movement. “In Stereo EP” is Q-ic And Stephenson’s first EP. Tracklist A1. The Sound A2. Honesty Lights Life B1. Japanese Tours B2. Tracklist A. Untitled B1. Untitled B2. Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1392, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Overrocket-Weather-Forecast/", "title": "Overrocket – Weather Forecast", "body": "OVERROCKET is an electropop unit consisting of Denki Groove engineers Takashi Watanabe, Michiyo Honda, and Mitsuto Suzuki. B-side “Weather Forecast (Rain Hat Mix)” is a remix by DJ Tasaka. Tracklist A1. Weather Forecast (Extended Mix) A2. Weather Forecast (Original Mix) B1. Weather Forecast (Rain Hat Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1393, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Newworldaquarium-The-Twenty-EP/", "title": "Newworldaquarium – The Twenty EP", "body": "Newworldaquarium (NWAQ), also known as Jochem Peteri, who was active under the name ROSS 154 in the 90s, is a Detroit techno-electro artist based in Amsterdam. This record was released in 2006 by the prestigious label “Delsin”, famous for its Detroit sound. Tracklist A1. Introduction A2. Bond A3. Curse Of The Bloody Puppets B1. Rox B2. The Twenty Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1394, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Larry-Carlton-Larry-Carlton/", "title": "Larry Carlton – Larry Carlton", "body": "「Mr.335」の愛称で知られるラリー・カールトンは、4度のグラミー賞に輝き、常にフュージョン界をリードしてきたレジェンド・ギタリストです。自身の名前を関したこのアルバムは、ラリー・カールトンのギターリストとしての地位を固めた一枚となりました。 Tracklist A1. Room 335 A2. Where Did You Come From A3. Nite Crawler A4. Point It Up B1. Rio Samba B2. I Apologize B3. Don´t Give It Up B4. (It Was) Only Yesterday メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1395, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Kaleidoscopio-Meu-Sonho/", "title": "Kaleidoscópio – Meu Sonho", "body": "Kaleidoscópio (Kaleidoscópio/Kaleido) is a drum”n”bass and bossa nova duo consisting of Ramilson Maia (DJ Ramilson Maia) and Janaina Lima (DJ Ramilson Maia) from São Paulo, Brazil. It became popular in Brazil and Italy in the early 2000s, and then became popular worldwide. The B-side includes a remix by Brazilian DJ Deeplick. Tracklist A1. Meu Sonho (Star Guitar Remix Extended Club) A2. Meu Sonho (Original Album) B1. Meu Sonho (Deeplick Remix Extended Club) B2. Meu Sonho (So Pra Mim Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1396, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Junior-Wells-and-Buddy-Guy-Live-Recording-At-Yuhbin-Chokin-Hall-On-March-1975/", "title": "Junior Wells & Buddy Guy – Live Recording At Yuhbin-Chokin Hall On March-1975", "body": "This is a live recording by Junior Wells & Buddy Guy at the Postal Savings Hall. Both Buddy and Junior demonstrate their skills as leaders and are fully active throughout the album. This 2-LP set is a must-see for blues fans. Tracklist A1. Let Me love You, Baby A2. How Blue Can You Get A3. High-Heel Sneakers A4. One Room Country Shack B1. First Time I Met The Blues B2. Stone Crazy B3. Fever (Work Song) B4. Come On Home To Me Baby B5. Rock Me Baby C1. Little By Little C2. Stop Breakin' Down C3. Don't Go No Further C4. Look Over Yonder's Wall C5. Snatch It Back And Hold It D1. Help Me Darling D2. Hoochie Coohie Man D3. Someday Baby D4. Waterman Blues (Instrumental) D5. Side A is a remix by British progressive house DJ Trisco (Harvey Dawson). Tracklist A. Pulse (Trisco Remix) B. Pulsed Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1398, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Dandy-Casanova/", "title": "Dandy – Casanova", "body": "Dandy’s “Casanova” was released in 1989 on the Italian label Flea Records. A Deeper Love (Underground Club Mix / Let's Go Chanting Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1400, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/By-All-Means-Somebody-Save-Me-(Altered-States)/", "title": "By All Means – Somebody Save Me (Altered States)", "body": "“By All Means - Somebody Save Me (Altered States)” Acid remix by Marshall Jefferson, a producer and DJ from Chicago. Tracklist A. Somebody Save Me (Altered States) B1. Somebody Save Me (Liquid Sky) B2. Somebody Save Me (Album Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1401, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Anthony-Flanagan-Never-Enough/", "title": "Anthony Flanagan – Never Enough", "body": "Anthony Flanagan is a New York-based singer who worked with Dennis Ferrer from the late ’90s to the early 2000s. The lyrics, producer, and arrangement for “Never Enough” were written by Kerri Chandler, who rocked the New York house scene with “The Shelter” (1992). Tracklist A1. Never Enough (Kerri's Main Mix) A2. Never Enough (6:23 Dub) B1. Never Enough (Dennis F.'s Satisfied Mix) B2. Never Enough (Dennis F's Aggravated Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1402, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Zeni-Geva-10,000-Light-Years/", "title": "Zeni Geva – 10000 Light Years", "body": "“Zeni Geva – 10000 Light Years” is Album promo recorded at Chicago Electrical Audio in October 2000. Tracklist 1. 10,000 Light Years 2. Implosion 3. Blastsphere 4. Interzona 2 5. Tyrannycide 6. Last Nanosecond 7. Hazchem 8. Auto-Fuck Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1403, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-Tresor-Compilation-Vol.-6/", "title": "Various – Tresor Compilation Vol. 6", "body": "「Various – Tresor Compilation Vol. 6」は、1998年にリリースされたコンピレーションアルバムです。 Tracklist 1. Regis –Theme From Streetwalker 2. Fumiya Tanaka –One Sparkle 3. Scan 7 –Triple Darkness 4. Surgeon & James Ruskin –Sound Pressure (Part 2){: .button1} 5. Chrislo –L'Eau (Surgeon Remix) 6. Pacou –Encounter 7. Cristian Vogel –They Bought You At The Party 8. Blake Baxter Feat. Taj –Used To Kiss Me 9. Neil Landstrumm–Tidal Wave Emulation 10. Heiko Laux–101 / 106 11. Infiniti –Thought Process 12. Basic Channel –Octaedre 13. Substance –Plate Element 2 メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1404, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Tresor-Compilation-Vol.-7/", "title": "Tresor Compilation Vol. 7", "body": "「Tresor Compilation Vol. 7」は、1999年にリリースされたコンピレーションアルバムです。 Tracklist 1. Karl O'Connor –Guiltless 8. Sterac –Rolling Thunder 9. Pacou –It's Jazzy 10. Rok –Dance With A Stranger 11. Daniel Bell –The Butterfly Effect 12. Savvas Ysatis –Alright (Surgeon's Keith 4 Nat Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1405, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Merzbow-Merzbird/", "title": "Merzbow – Merzbird", "body": "Merzbow’s “Merzbird” was released in 2004 by the American label Important Records. Tracklist 1. Suicidal Tendencies – Suicide's An Alternative 2. Unknown Artist –Untitled 3. Unknown Artis t–Untitled 4. Unknown Artist –Untitled 5. Artless Entanglements–Dildos, Bondage, And Toys 6. J.J. Burnel –Freddie Laker 7. The Blank Students –Background Music 8. Simple Minds – Chelsea Girls 9. Unknown Artist – Untitled 10. Stupid Babies – Baby Blues 11. Lee Perry –Crab Yarsなど Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1407, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Original-Caste-Mr.-Monday-Sweet-Chicago/", "title": "The Original Caste – Mr. Monday / Sweet Chicago", "body": "The Original Casteは、カナダのフォーク・グループ。 1966年にアルバータ州カルガリーで結成され、当時は「ザ・ノース・カントリー・シンガーズ」という名前で活動していました。 Tracklist A. Mr. Monday B. Sweet Chicago メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1408, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Nolans-Every-Home-Should-Have-One/", "title": "The Nolans – Every Home Should Have One", "body": "“The Nolans – Every Home Should Have One” is part of a series distributed as a prize in a Coca-Cola sweepstakes held in Japan in 1981. The title of the record is “Adored Aye Aye” on the front of the jacket and “Adored Aye Aye Every Home Should Have One” on the back. The record contains only the A side (label side) and the B side (signed color photo of the group) is not grooved. The record is packaged in a clear round-bottomed inner record bag and an outer paper jacket with a photo of the artist. The back of the outer jacket includes a brief artist biography (Japanese) and lyrics (English and Japanese). Tracklist A. Every Home Should Have One (あこがれアイ・アイ・アイ) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1409, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Dooleys-Body-Language/", "title": "The Dooleys – Body Language", "body": "The Dooleys were a mixed British pop group. At its peak, it had eight members, six of whom were members of the Dooley family. From 1977 to 1981, they produced several hits that reached the top of the British charts. Tracklist A. ボディ・ランゲージ = Body Language B. フォーエバー = Forever Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1410, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Dooleys-Wanted/", "title": "The Dooleys – Wanted", "body": "The Dooleys were a mixed British pop group. At its peak, it had eight members, six of whom were members of the Dooley family. From 1977 to 1981, they had several hits that topped the British charts, with “Wanted” reaching the top ten. Tracklist A1. Wanted = ウォンテッド B1. Movie Stars (And Comic Book Heroes) = ムービー・スターズ Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1411, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Spinach-Power-Popeye-The-Sailorman/", "title": "Spinach Power – Popeye The Sailorman", "body": "1978年にリリースされた「ポパイ」がモチーフのディスコ・ソング。「3、2、1、0」というセリフから始まる有名曲。メインボーカルは西濱哲男（トランザムの元リードボーカル）、コーラスは織田哲郎と村田有美、妹尾隆一郎はハーモニカで参加。 Tracklist A. ポパイ・ザ・セーラー・マン = Popeye The Sailor Man B. オリーブとブルートの競走曲 メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1412, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Robert-Plant-Heaven-Knows/", "title": "Robert Plant – Heaven Knows", "body": "Robert Plant is an English rock musician. Robert Plant, best known as the frontman of the hard rock band Led Zeppelin, is considered one of the greatest vocalists in rock history. Tracklist A. Heaven Knows (Vocal/Edit) B. Heaven Knows (Vocal/Edit) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1413, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Passionata-Himiko/", "title": "Passionata – Himiko", "body": "“Himiko” by Passionata was released in 1979. Passionata is a female trio from the Philippines that achieved great success in Japan and around the world. The girls started out as friends at university in the Philippines and performed as a trio from 1979 to 1983. Tracklist A. 卑弥呼 = Himiko B. 火星と金星の陰謀 = Venus And Mars Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1414, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Messengers-Thats-The-Way-A-Woman-Is/", "title": "Messengers – That's The Way A Woman Is", "body": "Messengers was an American pop rock band that was active from 1962 to 1972. That’s The Way A Woman Is is a representative song by Messengers released in 1971. Tracklist A. That's The Way A Woman Is (気になる女の子) B. The Letter (あの娘のレター) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1415, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Leif-Garrett-Feel-The-Need/", "title": "Leif Garrett – Feel The Need", "body": "Leif Garrett is an American singer, actor, and television personality. “Feel The Need” was released in 1979. Tracklist A. Feel The Need B. New York City Nights Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1416, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Klymaxx-The-Men-All-Pause-I-Miss-You/", "title": "Klymaxx – The Men All Pause / I Miss You", "body": "Klymaxx is an 80’s all-girl funk band created by Bernadette Cooper. “I Miss You” became a worldwide hit. Tracklist A. The Men All Pause B. I Miss You Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1417, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Herb-Alpert-Route-101/", "title": "Herb Alpert – Route 101", "body": "Herb Alpert（ハーブ・アルパート）の「Route101」は、1982年リリースのアルバム「Fandango」からのシングルカット。 「Route101」は、同年ビルボード誌のアダルト・コンテンポラリー・チャートで4位を記録。 Tracklist A. Route 101 B. Angel メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1418, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Dolly-Dots-American-Dream/", "title": "Dolly Dots – American Dream", "body": "Dolly Dots was a Dutch girl group that was active from the late 1970s to the late 1980s. It was successful not only in the Netherlands, but also in Belgium, Japan and Türkiye. Tracklist A1. (They Are) Rollerskating A2. Sing A Song Of Love A3. If This Is Love A4. Who Is That Waiting At Your Door A5. Let's Have A Party A6. You'Re The Only One B1. Radio B2. Dreammachine B3. We Believe In Love B4. Hey! Heartbreaker B5. Hollywood B6. My Boyfriend's Back Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1419, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/DJ-Scot-Project-O/", "title": "DJ Scot Project – O", "body": "DJ Scot Project（Frank Zenker）は、90年代からハードトランスシーンで成功を収めたドイツ人 DJ/プロデューサーです。 「DJ Scot Project – O」は彼の代表作の一つで、00年代のレイヴァーにとってのアンセムとして知られています。 Tracklist A1. O B1. O (Arome Rmx) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1420, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Boney-M.-Hooray-Hooray-Its-A-Holi-Holiday/", "title": "Boney M. – Hooray Hooray It\"s A Holi-Holiday", "body": "Boney M.’s Hooray Hooray It’s A Holi-Holiday (Hooray! Hooray!) was released in conjunction with the Japan tour at the time, as indicated by the “Japan commemorative edition” written in red Japanese on the jacket. “Ribbons Of Blue” has more pronounced pedal steel than the regular version, especially in the intro. Tracklist A. Hooray! Hooray! It's A Holi-Holiday B. Ribbons Of Blue Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1421, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Mighty-Quark-Disco-Blood/", "title": "The Mighty Quark – Disco Blood", "body": "The Mighty Quark is the minimal techno unit of DK7”s Mark O”Sullivan and Walter Bäcklin. The A-side “Disco Blood” features Swedish techno house DJ Jesper Dahlbäck, and “Physical” is a remix by Irish DJ Fish Go Deep. Tracklist A1. Disco Blood A2. Physical (Fish Go Deep Remix) B1. Physical (Mark And John Remix) B2. Blessed Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1422, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Expression-The-Expression/", "title": "The Expression – The Expression", "body": "The Expression is a synthpop rock band formed in Sydney, Australia in 1981. \"”The Expression” is an album with a ““new wave” pop style, featuring sharp guitar riffs, synthesizers, and a unique vocal style. Tracklist A1. Present Communication A2. With Closed Eyes A3. Total Eclipse A4. Keep Appointments A5. Right To A Slice B1. Dawn, Day And Sleep B2. Decisions B3. You And Me B4. Nothing Changes B5. Satisfied Strangers Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1423, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Rene-Breitbarth-With-A-Little-Luck/", "title": "Rene Breitbarth – With A Little Luck", "body": "Rene Breitbarth’s “With A Little Luck” was released in 2005 on the Irish label Ork Recordings. René Breitbarth is a German DJ and producer, and one of the founders of the Cologne, Germany-based label Treibstoff. Tracklist A. C-Moon B1. Sir Paul B2. Silly Love Songs C1. Cooling The Plasma C2. With A Little Luck D1. Let 'Em In D2. Magic Man A2. Dreamboat Annie (Fantasy Child) A3. Crazy On You A4. Soul Of The Sea A5. Dreamboat Annie B1. White Lightning & Wine B2. Love Me Like Music (I'll Be Your Song) B3. Sing Child B4. Darkness Falls (Joey Beltram Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1431, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Echo-and-The-Bunnymen-Enlighten-Me-(Extended-Remix)/", "title": "Echo & The Bunnymen – Enlighten Me (Extended Remix)", "body": "Echo & The Bunnymen are a UK rock band formed in Liverpool in 1978. Patsy Cline–Walkin' After Midnight メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1437, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Beatles-Let-It-Be/", "title": "The Beatles – Let It Be", "body": "The Beatles’ “Let It Be” was released in March 1970 and was the last single released by the Beatles during their active career, as they disbanded the following month. Oops...I Did It Again (Dub Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1444, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Boney-M.-Rasputin/", "title": "Boney M. – Rasputin", "body": "Boney M. – Rasputin was released by Atlantic in 1978. Tracklist A1 The Sun Ain't Gonna Shine (Anymore) A2 After The Lights Go Out A3 People Get Ready A4 Everything's Gonna Be Alright A5 Old Folks A6 Take It Like A Man B1 (Baby) You Don't Have To Tell Me B2 I Need You B3 My Love Is Growing B4 Young Man Cried B5 Just For A Thrill B6 Don't Fight It Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1448, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-5th-Dimension-Aquarius-Let-The-Sunshine-In/", "title": "The 5th Dimension – Aquarius Let The Sunshine In", "body": "The 5th Dimensio(フィフス ディメンション)は、サンシャインポップ、ポップソウル、サイケデリックソウルのスタイルで、1960年代後半から1970年代前半にかけて活躍したUSボーカルグループです。 1969年に「Aquarius / Let The Sunshine In 」でグラミー賞最優秀レコード賞を受賞。 Tracklist A. Aquarius/Let The Sunshine In (The Flesh Failures) B. The Magic Garden メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1449, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Takayuki-Inoue-Band-Taiyou-ni-hoero4/", "title": "Takayuki Inoue Band - Taiyou ni hoero4", "body": "“Takayuki Inoue Band – Hoero ni Taiyo! 4” is the original soundtrack for the TV drama “Hoero ni Taiyo!” Released in 1976 by Polydor. Performance – Takayuki Inoue Band Composition and arrangement – ​​Katsuo Ohno Producer – Koji Ishikawa Tracklist A1. 冒険のテーマ・1 A2. 冒険のテーマ・2 B1. 新「愛」のテーマ Purchase on Mercari" }, { "id": 1450, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Space-Raiders-Glam-Raid/", "title": "Space Raiders – Glam Raid", "body": "Space Raiders are a UK electro trio from Middlesbrough, England, formed in 1997. “Glam Raid” was released in 1998 by Skint, a label that led the early big beat scene, including Fatboy Slim, Freq Nasty, Midfield General, and Lo-Fidelity Allstars. Tracklist A Glam Raid (Edit) B Boy Power (Edit) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1451, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Seiko-Matsuda-Aoi-Sangosho/", "title": "松田聖子 – 青い珊瑚礁", "body": "「松田聖子 – 青い珊瑚礁」は、1980年にリリースされました。 Tracklist A. 青い珊瑚礁 B. True Love そっとくちづけて アレンジ – 大村雅朗 コンポーズ – 小田裕一郎 歌詞 – 三浦徳子 カバー写真 – 篠山紀信 メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1452, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Sam-(The-Man)-Taylor-Hit-Songs/", "title": "Sam (The Man) Taylor – Hit Songs", "body": "「Sam (The Man) Taylor – 25時のサム・テイラー」は、有線のヒット曲集で、1970年にリリースされました。 Tracklist A1. 恋ひとすじ – 森進一 A2. 逢わずに愛して – 内山田洋とクールファイブ A3. 国際線待合室 – 青江三奈 A4. いいじゃないの幸せなら – 佐良直美 A5. 夜の柳ヶ瀬 – カサノヴァ７ A6. ひとり寝の子守唄 – 加藤登紀子 A7. 長崎は今日も雨だった – 内山田洋とクール・ファイブ B1. 新宿の女 – 藤圭子 B2. 夜と朝のあいだに – ピーター B3. 花と涙 – 森進一 B4. 年上の女 – 年上の女 B5. 思案橋ブルース – 中井昭・高橋勝とコロラティーノ B6. 花と蝶 – 森進一 B7. 港町ブルース – 森進一 メルカリで購入" }, { "id": 1453, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Rough-Cutt-Rough-Cutt/", "title": "Rough Cutt – Rough Cutt", "body": "Rough Cutt（ラフ・カット）は、 Ozzy Osbourne（オジー・オズボーン）のJake E. Lee（ジェイク・E・リー）, Orgy（オージー）のAmir Derakh（アミール・デラク）, Quiet Riot（クワイエット・ライオット）のPaul Shortino（ポール・ショーティノ）などが在籍していたLA出身のUSヘヴィメタル・バンド。 Tracklist A1. Take Her A2. Piece Of My Heart A3. Never Gonna Die A4. Dreamin' Again A5. Cutt Your Heart Out B1. Black Widow B2. You Keep Breaking My Heart B3. Kids Will Rock B4. Dressed To Kill B5. She's Too Hott メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1454, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Reflection-Eternal-On-Mission/", "title": "Reflection Eternal – On Mission", "body": "“Reflection Eternal / Shabaam Sahdeeq Featuring The Cocoa Brovaz – On Mission / Every Rhyme I Write” was released in 1999 by Rawkus. Rawcotiks is a unit of Dominican hip-hop musicians Jeff Valentino and Bladmillo Castillo based in Washington Heights, New York. Tracklist A1. Nevertheless (Radio Version) A2. Nevertheless (Street Version) A3. Nevertheless (Instrumental Version) B1. Real Heads (Radio Version) B2. Real Heads (Street Version) B3. Real Heads (Instrumental Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1456, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/RJD2-Heres-Whats-Left/", "title": "RJD2 – Here\"s What\"s Left", "body": "RJD2 (Ramble Jon Krohn) is a US hip-hop/electronic producer and DJ. The album includes Murphy”s covers of Magazine”s “The Light Pours Out of Me” and Pere Ubu’s “Final Solution.” Released in 1986. Tracklist A1. Canvas Beauty (Romance Version) A2. The Light Pours Out Of Me A3. Confessions A4. Should The World Fail To Fall Apart A5. Never Man B1. God Sends B2. Blue Heart B3. The Answer Is Clear B4. Final Solution B5. Jemal Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1458, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Passage-Passage/", "title": "Passage – Passage", "body": "Passage is a solo project by Louis Johnson, the bassist for the American soul/funk/jazz/disco band Brothers Johnson. A trio group that includes Louis’ ex-wife Valerie Johnson and former Brothers Johnson percussionist and singer Richard Heath. Tracklist A1. Have You Heard The Word A2. You Can't Be Livin' A3. Faith Walking People A4. I See The Light A5. The Great Flood B1. Open Up Your Heart B2. Power B3. Love Eyes B4. The Son Will Come Again Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1459, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/One-Day-As-A-Lion-One-Day-As-A-Lion/", "title": "One Day As A Lion – One Day As A Lion", "body": "One Day As A Lion is a collaboration between Rage Against the Machine vocalist Zack de la Rocha and former drummer for The Mars Volta and current drummer for Queens of the Stone Age, Jon. A power duo supergroup formed in 2008 by Theodore (John Theodore). One Day As A Lion is characterized by a style that mixes alternative rock and rap. Tracklist 1. Wild International 2. Ocean View 3. Last Letter 4. If You Fear Dying 5. One Day As A Lion Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1460, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Newton-Family-Don-Quijote/", "title": "Newton Family – Don Quijote", "body": "“Newton Family – Don Quijote” Newton Family was a Hungarian disco group that was active from the mid-70s to the late 80s. Lyrics – Kazuya Senke Music & Arrangement – ​​Kyohei Tsutsumi Recording member (guitar) – Masayoshi Takanaka Tracklist A. わたしの彼は左きき B. ひとりの私 Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1465, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Masashi-Sada-Nagasaki/", "title": "Masashi Sada – Nagasaki Yoyoku", "body": "“Masashi Sada – Nagasaki Sayokyoku” was released in 1982. A-side arrangement – ​​Toshiyuki Watanabe B-side arrangement – ​​Masashi Sada Side A/B Lyrics & Music – Masashi Sada The B-side is the theme song for Fuji TV’s “Kita no Kuni Kara”. Tracklist A. 長崎小夜曲 B. 北の国から ー 遥かなる大地より〜蛍のテーマ Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1466, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Jiros-Peace-Peace/", "title": "Jiro's –Peace Peace", "body": "“Jiro”s - Peace Peace - Children Who Don”t Know About War” was released in 1971. Arrangement: Shunichi Makaino Lyrics: Osamu Kitayama Composer: Jiro Sugita Song: Jirose Tracklist A. 戦争を知らない子供たち = Peace Peace B. 愛とあなたのために = For The Love & You Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1467, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Isao-Sasaki-Yamato/", "title": "Isao Sasaki – Farewell Space Battleship Yamato Warriors of Love – Good Enemy", "body": "“Isao Sasaki - Farewell Space Battleship Yamato: Warriors of Love - Good Enemy” is an insert song/image song for the 1978 movie “Farewell Space Battleship Yamato: Warriors of Love.” Lyrics - Yu Aku Composition/Arrangement - Yasushi Miyagawa Song - Isao Sasaki Tracklist A. 好敵手 B. テレサよ永遠に Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1468, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Irene-Cara-Fame/", "title": "Irene Cara – Fame", "body": "Irene Cara is an American singer and actress. She played the role of Coco Hernandez in the 1980 musical film ““Fame,” and the film’s title song ““Fame” became a worldwide hit. Irene Cara is also famous for singing “Flashdance… What a Feeling” from the movie “Flashdance.” Tracklist A. Irene Cara–Fame B. Contemporary Gospel Chorus The High School Of Music And Art–Never Alone Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1469, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Inner-Circle-Black-Roses/", "title": "Inner Circle – Black Roses", "body": "Inner Circle, also known as The Inner Circle Band or The Bad Boys of Reggae, is a Jamaican reggae band formed in Kingston in 1968. “Bad Boys”, included on this CD, became a worldwide hit and is also famous as the theme song for the American TV program COPS. Tracklist 1. Man Standing On The Corner 2. One Vibe 3. Black Roses 4. No Stopping Us Now 5. Freedom Street 6. Goodbye Baby 7. Bass Line 8. Fallin In Love 9. Picture On The Wall 10. Bad Boys Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1470, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Hiromi-Go-Boy-and-Girl/", "title": "郷ひろみ – 男の子女の子", "body": "「郷ひろみ（Hiromi Go）– 男の子女の子」は、 1972年リリースの郷ひろみ1作目のシングル(デビュー曲)です。 歌詞 – 岩谷時子 ミュージック＆アレンジ – 筒美京平 Tracklist A. 男の子女の子 B. 夢をおいかけて メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1471, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Govna-Matic-Family-Day/", "title": "Govna Matic – Family Day", "body": "Govna Matic is another name for Gov Matic (Tha Governer) from Diezzle Don & Tha Governer. You Don't Have To Say You Love Me = この胸のときめきを B. Patch It Up = パッチ・イット・アップ メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1474, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Earth-and-Fire-Seasons/", "title": "Earth and Fire - Seasons", "body": "Earth & Fire(アース・アンド・ファイアー)は、オランダ、フォールスホーテン/フォールブルグ出身のポップロックバンド。1969年リリースの「Seasons(シーズンズ)」はEarth & Fireの代表曲。 Tracklist A. Seasons = シーズン B. Hazy Paradise = 霧のパラダイス メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1475, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Earth-Quake-198X/", "title": "Earth Quake 198X", "body": "Bass: Nathan Watts Drums: Mark Craney Guitar: Al Hendrickson, Spencer Baines Piano: Mark Saphire Producer: Hiroshi Kuwashima, Samuel McWhorter Tracklist A. 恐怖の大地震＜特別試聴盤＞ B. 恐怖の大地震＜特別試聴盤＞ Purchase on Mercari" }, { "id": 1476, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Down-Town-Boogie-Woogie-Band-Smoking-Boogie/", "title": "Down Town Boogie Woogie Band - Smoking Boogie", "body": "“Smoking Boogie” is The third single by the Down Town Boogie Woogie Band, released on the EXPRESS label in December 1974. In The Music (Superchumbo's High Octane Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1478, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Calm-People-From-The-Sun-And-The-Earth/", "title": "Calm – People From The Sun And The Earth", "body": "Calm (Kiyotaka Fukagawa) is considered one of the pioneers of chill-out Balearic music. Calm’s activities under other names include FARR, Organ Language, K.F, and the unit JAPANESE SYNCHRO SYSTEM with ILL-BOSSTINO of THA BLUE HERB. A1&B2 is a remix by MKL vs. Soy Sos of 3 Generations Walking. B2 is a remix by Dixon, a German DJ and producer based in Berlin. Tracklist A1. People From The Sun And The Earth (MKL vs. Soy Sos Dark Sun Mix) A2. People From The Sun And The Earth (Original Mix) B1. People From The Sun And The Earth (Dixon Remix) B2. People From The Sun And The Earth (MKL vs. Soy Sos Dark Ambient Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1479, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Baruka-Play-It-Loud/", "title": "Baruka – Play It Loud", "body": "Baruka is one of the projects of Dutch techno DJ/producer Orlando Voorn. Other names include Balance, Frequency, Basic Bastard, Fix, Dope Dog, Boy, Stalker, and The Nighttripper. Orlando Voorn”s music is characterized by a mix of various elements, including techno, drum”n’bass, ambient, hip-hop, and electro. Side A is a remix of Samuel L Session. Tracklist A. Play It Loud (SLS Mix) B. Play It Loud (Baruka Play It Long Mix) C1. Play It Loud (G-Force Mix) C2. Play It Loud (Phont Mix) D1. Play It Loud (Original Mix) D2. Play It Loud (Baruka Have A Break Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1480, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Tigers-Smile-For-Me/", "title": "The Tigers – Smile For Me", "body": "“Smile For Me” is a song written and composed by Barry Gibb and Maurice Gibb of the Bee Gees. Tracklist A. Smile For Me = スマイル・フォー・ミー 作詞・作曲:Barry Gibb,Maurice Gibb 編曲：John Fiddy B. Rain Falls On The Lonely = 淋しい雨 作詞・作曲:Ronald F. Bond,Ronnie Sebastian 編曲：John Fiddy Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1481, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Rascals-People-Got-To-Be-Free-My-World/", "title": "The Rascals – People Got To Be Free My World", "body": "The Rascals are a blue-eyed soul band formed in New York in 1964. They released a series of hit songs from 1965 to 1969, and People Got To Be Free (Hymn to Freedom) is one of their hit songs and signature songs. The band also influenced Japanese musicians such as Shogo Hamada and Tatsuro Yamashita. Tracklist A. People Got To Be Free B. My World Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1482, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Moody-Brothers-Brown-Eyed-Girl-Reggae-Cowboy/", "title": "The Moody Brothers –Brown Eyed Girl Reggae Cowboy", "body": "The Moody Brothers(ムーディー ブラザーズ)は、1980年代から1990年代にかけて活躍したアメリカーナ カントリー ミュージックトリオ。メンバーは、Carlton Moody(カールトン・ムーディ)、Dave Moody(デイブ・ムーディ)、Trent Moody(トレント・ムーディ)の３兄弟。 A面の作詞はVan Morrison(ヴァン・モリソン)、B面の作詞はBellamy Brothers(ベラミー・ブラザーズ)のDavid Bellamy(デヴィット ベラミー)。 Tracklist A. Brown Eyed Girl B. Reggae Cowboy メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1483, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Monkees-Words/", "title": "The Monkees - Words", "body": "The Monkees are an American rock band formed by Davy Jones, Micky Dolenz, Mike Nesmith, and Peter Tork. They had a media mix strategy that linked record sales with ““The Monkees Show,’’ a one-episode slapstick comedy TV show in which The Monkees themselves appeared. Tracklist A1. Words A2. Pleasant Valley Sunday B1. A Little Bit Me, A Little Bit You B2. The Girl I Knew Somewhere Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1484, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Folk-Crusaders-I-Only-Live-Twice/", "title": "The Folk Crusaders - I Only Live Twice", "body": "“Returning Yopparai” was The Folk Crusaders’ debut single and the first million-selling single in Oricon chart history. It is also the song that created the “underground folk” boom, and is a representative work of Japanese comic songs. Tracklist A. 帰って来たヨッパライ 作詞:フォーク・パロディ・ギャング（松山猛・北山修） 作曲:加藤和彦 編曲:ザ・フォーク・クルセダーズ B. ソーラン節 北海道民謡 編曲:加藤和彦 Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1485, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Belle-Stars-Iko-Iko/", "title": "The Belle Stars– Iko Iko", "body": "A面の「 Iko Iko 」は、 The Bodysnatchers(ボディスナッチャーズ)の元メンバーによって1980年にロンドンで結成されたUKポップ・ガールズバンドThe Belle Stars(ベル・スターズ)によるカバー曲。 The Belle Starsヴァージョンの Iko Iko は映画「レインマン」（主演：ダスティン・ホフマン、トム・クルーズ）や、映画『ノッキン・オン・ヘブンズ・ドア』、映画『ハングオーバー』にも収録された。 B面の「Las Vegas」は、著名な映画音楽の作曲家Hans Zimmer(ハンス・ジマー)によるもので、この曲も映画「レインマン」のサウンドトラックに収録されている。 Tracklist A. The Belle Stars – Iko Iko B. Hans Zimmer - Las Vegas メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1486, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Bee-Gees-Massachusetts/", "title": "The Bee Gees – Massachusetts", "body": "“Massachusetts” is a song released by the Bee Gees in 1967 that became a worldwide hit. The main vocalist of this song is Robin Gibb. Tracklist A. Massachusetts（マサチューセッツ） B. Holiday（ホリディ） Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1487, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Talking-Heads-And-She-Was/", "title": "Talking Heads – And She Was", "body": "「And She Was」は、USロックバンドTalking Heads（トーキング・ヘッズ）が1985年にリリースした6枚目のアルバム『リトル・クリーチャーズ』（Little Creatures）からのシングルカット。 ジャケットは、アメリカの芸術家Howard Finster（ハワード・フィンスター）によるもの。 Tracklist A. And She Was B. And She Was (E.T. Version) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1488, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Shofukutei-Tsuruko-Uguisudani-Music-Hall/", "title": "Shofukutei Tsuruko - Uguisudani Music Hall", "body": "“Uguisudani Music Hall” is a comic song released by Shofutei Tsurumitsu in May 1975. Lyrics, composition, arrangement - Masayuki Yamamoto Tracklist A. うぐいすだにミュージックホール B. ももえちゃん Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1489, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Screamin-Jay-Hawkins-Constipation-Blues/", "title": "Screamin Jay Hawkins – Constitution Blues", "body": "This song by Screamin’ Jay Hawkins was sung and performed by Screamin’ Jay Hawkins, an American blues singer known for his unique and unique style. He is known for his unique stage performances and powerful, harsh vocals. “Constipation Blues” is a blues song with humor and satire in its lyrics, and the comical expressions in the lyrics are particularly noteworthy. Screamin’ Jay Hawkins challenged the boundaries between blues and rock with his playing style and eccentric stage performances. This song is one of the most iconic pieces of Screamin’ Jay Hawkins’ career and personality, embodying the unique and mysterious nature of his music. Tracklist A. Constipation Blues = べんぴのぶるーす B. I'm Lonely = 男泣きのブルース Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1490, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Roy-Montgomery-Particle-Wave/", "title": "Roy Montgomery – Particle Wave", "body": "Roy Montgomery is a composer and guitarist from Christchurch, New Zealand, and is known as a pioneer of the NZ underground. Roy Montgomery’s solo instrumental music style is a mix of post-rock, lo-fi, folk, avant-garde, and experimental music. Tracklist A. Particle B. This Is The Right Time Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1495, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Les-Baxter-His-Chorus-And-Orchestra-Tamboo(Part-3)/", "title": "Les Baxter His Chorus And Orchestra – Tamboo(Part 3)", "body": "This song by Les Baxter and his choir and orchestra appears on the album Tamboo!, released in 1956. Les Baxter is known for his unique exotic and sensual musical style, and his work pioneered genres such as exotica and space age pop. “Tamboo! (Part 3)” is a song characterized by Baxter”s unique arrangement and orchestration, and has been highly praised in the soundtrack and lounge music fields. The song encapsulates the typical elements of Baxter”s music, including Caribbean rhythms and the use of exotic instruments. Tracklist A1. Pantan A2. Havana B1. Mozambique B2. The song was written, composed and produced by Janet Jackson and the US music producer and songwriter duo Jam & Lewis (Jimmy Jam and Terry Lewis). Tracklist A. Doesn't Really Matter B. Doesn't Really Matter Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1497, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/James-Brown-Its-A-Mans-Mans-World/", "title": "James Brown - It\"s A Man\"s Man's World", "body": "This song was written by James Brown and is known as one of his masterpieces. This song was released in 1966 and is considered a masterpiece of soul music with its powerful and emotional performance. The lyrics of this song are about a world dominated by men, but at the same time they express gratitude towards women. Brown’s powerful vocals and emotional singing leave deep impressions on listeners, making her presence stand out. The song occupies an important place in Brown’s musical career and is widely praised as a soul and R&B classic. Due to her deep singing and heart-touching messages, she continues to be loved by many listeners today. Tracklist A. It's A Man's Man's World B. Papa's Got A Brand New Bag Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1498, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Genghis-Khan-Moskau-Rocking-Son-Of-Dschinghis-Khan/", "title": "Genghis Khan – Moskau Rocking Son Of Dschinghis Khan", "body": "Genghis Khan was a West German group that was active worldwide from 1979 to 1985. “Moskau” was a worldwide hit from the album “Genghis Khan” released in 1979. Tracklist A. Moskau (めざせモスクワ) B. Rocking Son Of Dschinghis Khan (ロッキング・サン) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1499, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Economic-Animals-Minato-no-Yoko/", "title": "Economic Animals - Minato no Yoko", "body": "エコノミック・アニマルズは、佐々木勉が中心となった覆面バンド。「帰ってきた港のヨーコ」は、「港のヨーコ・ヨコハマ・ヨコスカ」の後日譚＆パロディー、アンサーソングとして1975年にリリースされた。 作詞・作曲・歌：エコノミック・アニマルズ Tracklist A. 帰ってきた港のヨーコ B. バイ•バイ•マイ•ラブ メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1500, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Stock-Hausen-and-Walkman-Ventilating-Deer/", "title": "Stock, Hausen & Walkman – Ventilating Deer", "body": "Stock, Hausen & Walkman (ストック、ハウゼン & ウォークマン)は、90年代を代表するUKサンプリング・コラージュ・ミュージックユニット。 ストック、ハウゼン & ウォークマン (1991-2001)というバンド名は、電子音楽のパイオニアであるカールハインツ・シュトックハウゼン、80年代の量産型ポップスを手がけたストック・エイトキン・ウォーターマン、そしてソニーのウォークマンを掛け合わせたものだ。 結成当初の1980年代後半は、マット・ワンド (バンド名付け親かつ創設者) とギタリストのレックス・カスウェルによる実験即興デュオでした。 活動中には、チェロのダン・ウィーバー、ドラマーのリチャード・ハリスン、アンドリュー・シャープリーらがライブやスタジオで参加。 1990年には、デレク・ベイリーの要請で「カンパニー・ウィーク」にも出演。 カスウェルがデンマークに移住し、ウィーバーがダンスや演劇の仕事でレコーディング休止になった後も、ワンドを中心として活動は続き、恐らく最も成功したアルバム「Organ Transplants vol.1 & 2」が制作された。 シャープリーも音楽面で貢献している。 ワンドは、S,H&W レコードを世に出すために Hot Air Recordsを設立・運営し、同レーベルで自分たちの作品だけでなく、他のアーティストの作品も幅広くリリースした。 現在もレーベルを続け、アルバムの企画、デザイン、プロデュースを行っている。 2001年にプロジェクトは終了したが、ワンドは Hot Air から「興味深い」S,H&W のアーカイブ・マテリアルをリリースし続けている。 Tracklist A1. Sleep A2. Upset A3. Ordeal A4. Broccoli A5. Spot B1. Feather B2. Gruel B3. Würstsaft B4. Skipper B5. Flagging メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1501, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Smurf-and-Perry-Lovin-You/", "title": "Smurf & Perry – Lovin' You", "body": "Smurf & Perry is a unit of German DJ Big Smurf (Frank Koopmann) and Fred Perry. “Lovin’ You” featured vocalist Concha Buika and was released by Flamingo Discos in 2001. “Smurf & Perry – Lovin” You” samples Donald Byrd”s “Loving You,” released in 1978. Tracklist A1. Lovin' You (Vincenzo's Classic Club Mix) A2. Lovin' You (Original Mix) B1. Lovin' You (Gucciman’s Everyday Style Mix) B2. Lovin' You (C.R. (Dead On It)” is a song from James Brown’s album “Dead On The Heavy Funk 1975-1983”. Released in 1975, this song is known for James Brown’s unique energetic and funky sound. Throughout the album, Brown showcases his talent for fusing different genres, including funk, soul, and R&B. The lyrics of “Hustle!!! (Dead On It)” explore themes of hard work, perseverance, and the hustle for success. James Brown’s signature up-tempo and dynamic songs and performances create an overall positive atmosphere. The song is known not only for its musicality but also for its motivational message, making it a favorite among funk and soul music lovers among its fans. Tracklist A. Hustle!!! (Dead On It) B. Isao Tomita”s “Planet” was highly praised as an innovative work of electronic music, and attracted attention as a fusion of classical music and electronic music. Jacket design is by Stanislaw Fernandes. Tracklist A1. I Mars A2. II Venus A3. III Mercury B1. IV Jupiter B2. V Saturn B3. VI Uranus B4. VII Neptune Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1523, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Tomita-Cosmos/", "title": "Tomita – Cosmos", "body": "“Cosmos” is one of Isao Tomita’s musical works related to space.It was composed by combining science and music to express the mystery and grandeur of the universe, making full use of electronic music and synthesizers to musically express the image of the universe. “Space Fantasy” is music inspired by the stars, galaxies, and planets of the universe, and is an album that highlights Isao Tomita’s synthesizer technique and sound design. Tracklist A1. Space Fantasy A2. Pacific 231 A3. Unanswered Question A4. Star Wars Theme B1. Aranjuez B2. Solvejg's Song B3. Hora Staccato B4. The “Babylon and On” album also attracted attention for its distinctive pop sound and sophisticated songs. In particular, songs such as “Hourglass” are known as Squeeze’s signature songs. Wink was a pioneering DJ in the American rave scene in the early 1990s, and “Higher State Of Consciousness” is one of his signature songs. The A-side remix is ​​Dirty South and TV Rock. The B-side remix is ​​Marco V. Tracklist A1. Higher State Of Consciousness (Dirty South & TV Rock Club Mix) A2. Higher State Of Consciousness (Original Tweekin Acid Funk Mix) B. Among his remixes, Yann Tiersen’s theme to the movie Amélie became a crossover hit. “Pixelated Porn King” was released in 2002 by Tuning Spork Records. Tracklist A1. Funkin A2. Porno Frenzy B1. The first track on the B-side is a remix by US disco and electronic DJ/producer Danny Krivit. Tracklist A. Strings Of Life (Stronger On My Own) (Full Length Vocal) AA1. In the late 1990s, he was active in the “2-Step” Garage scene, releasing songs such as a remix of James Brown”s “Funk On Ah Roll.” “Spellbound” is a remix of Bas NoirMy’s “Love Is Magic” released in 1988 on the label Nu groove. Tracklist A. The A-side is a remix by Swedish DJ/producer Axwell (Axel Hedfors), who is also a member of Swedish House Mafia. The B-side is a remix by Bhangra Knights member Jules Spinner. Tracklist A. 2 Million Ways (Axwell Remix) B1. 2 Million Ways (Jules Spinner Remix) B2. 2 Million Ways (Original Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1574, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Anthony-Vieira-Merino-EP/", "title": "Anthony Vieira – Merino EP", "body": "Anthony Vieira is a unit formed by Raoul Delgardo and Tony Soares Vieira. “Anthony Vieira – Merino EP” was released in 1999 by the UK techno label Sheep Records. Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1575, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Adam-Marshall-Remote-Culture/", "title": "Adam Marshall – Remote Culture", "body": "Adam Marshall is a Canadian-born DJ/producer and owner of the label New Kanada, currently based in Berlin. Also active as a unit called Graze with Christian Andersen. “Remote Culture” was released in 2005 on Mike Shannon’s Canadian minimal dub deep techno/house label Cynosure. Tracklist A. Magnum B1. Illuminator B2. Nature Gone Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1576, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Adam-Beyer-Tasty-Bits/", "title": "Adam Beyer – Tasty Bits", "body": "A two-disc set released in 1997 by the label Drumcode run by Swedish techno DJ/producer Adam Beyer, who was a central figure in the Swedish minimal techno scene in the late 1990s. Tracklist A1. Untitled A2. Untitled B1. Untitled B2. Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1578, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/ACDC-Flick-Of-The-Switch/", "title": "AC/DC – Flick Of The Switch", "body": "『Flick of the Switch（フリック・オブ・ザ・スイッチ）』は、オーストラリアのハードロックバンドAC/DCの9枚目のスタジオ・アルバムです。 このアルバムは、バンドの1980年の『Back in Black』や1981年の『For Those About to Rock』といった前作と比較して売り上げが伸び悩み、バンドの商業的な衰退の始まりを示すものとされました。 AC/DCのリードボーカルであるブライアン・ジョンソンが参加した3枚目のアルバムであり、また、ドラマーのフィル・ラッドが一時的に脱退する前の最後のアルバムとなります。 Tracklist A1. Rising Power A2. This House Is On Fire A3. Flick Of The Switch A4. Nervous Shakedown A5. Landslide B1. Guns For Hire B2. Deep In The Hole B3. Bedlam In Belgium B4. Badlands B5. Brain Shake メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1579, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-King-Britt-Presents-Black-To-The-Future/", "title": "Various – King Britt Presents Black To The Future", "body": "A compilation by King Britt, a key figure in the Philadelphia house scene. The first track on side A, The Society, is a project of composer/arranger/saxophonist Thomas Hass, a touring member of Senor Coconut. Tracklist A1. The Society –How's Life A2. Charlie Dark –Drums Of Passion B1. Face – Butter Angel B2. Capitol A – Da'Bring Back B3. Yesterdays New Quintet – 18 And Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1580, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Spudmonsters-No-Guarantees/", "title": "The Spudmonsters – No Guarantees", "body": "The Spudmonsters are an American thrash metal, hardcore, crossover band formed in 1987 by Don Foose, Scott Roberts, Steve Swanson, Eric Matthews, and Chris Andrews from Cleveland, Ohio. “No Guarantees” was released in 1995 on the German label Massacre Records. Tracklist A1. Upperhand A2. Bloodline A3. The Exploited A4. Phoenix A5. Dot Yer Eye A6. Poverty A7. Cross The Line A8. Haywire March A9. Breakdown B1. Blood From A Rock B2. Down But Not Out B3. Eye Of The Storm B4. Generation X B5. Broken B6. The B-side is a remix by Ben Sims, a DJ/producer from London, UK. Tracklist A. The Ancestors (Oliver Ho Remix) B. The Ancestors (Ben Sims Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1585, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/O.L.-Feinmechanik-Knochenbrecher/", "title": "O.L. – Feinmechanik Knochenbrecher", "body": "O.L. is the alias of Oliver Lieb, who was a central figure in German trance techno in the early 1990s. Oliver Lieb works under a number of aliases, including Spicelab, LSG, and Ambush. “O.L. – Feinmechanik / Knochenbrecher” was released in 2000 on Delirium Red, a sub-label of Delirium run by German techno DJ/producer Jörg Henze. Tracklist A. Feinmechanik AA. Knochenbrecher Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1586, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Moby-Why-Does-My-Heart-Feel-So-Bad/", "title": "Moby – Why Does My Heart Feel So Bad", "body": "A remix of “Moby – Why Does My Heart Feel So Bad?” released in 1999 on the UK label Mute. Side A is a remix by German DJ/producer ATB (Andre Tanneberger). The first track on side B is a remix by Ferry Corsten (System F), one of the founders of Dutch trance. The second song on the B side is a remix by The Sharp Boys, a unit composed of George Michell and Steven React. Tracklist A. Why Does My Heart Feel So Bad? (ATB Remix) B1. Why Does My Heart Feel So Bad? (Ferry Corsten Remix) B2. Why Does My Heart Feel So Bad? (Sharp Roadster Club Edit) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1587, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Justin-Berkovi-I-Can-Feel-The-Sound/", "title": "Justin Berkovi – I Can Feel The Sound", "body": "Justin Berkovi is a London-based techno DJ/producer and founder of Predicaments. Additionally, Justin Berkovi is participating in the music and visual art group NO FUTURE, which is led by Christian Vogel, along with Si Begg, Jamie Lidell, and others. “I Can Feel The Sound” was released in 2004 by Belgian techno label Music Man Records. Side A is a remix by DJ/producer Phil Kieran from Belfast, Northern Ireland. The first song on side B is a remix by French DJ Max Waldern. Tracklist A. I Can Feel The Sound (Phil Kieran Remix) B1. I Can Feel The Sound (Max Walder Remix) B2. I Can Feel The Sound (Original Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1588, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Holy-Moses-Queen-Of-Siam/", "title": "Holy Moses – Queen Of Siam", "body": "Holy Moses is a German thrash metal band that has been active since 1980. The front is Sabina Classen. Known as a pioneering group of female death voice vocalists. “Queen Of Siam” is Holy Moses’ debut album, released in 1986 by German heavy metal label Aaarrg Records. Tracklist A1. Necropolis A2. Don't Mess Around With The Bitch A3. Devils Dancer A4. Queen Of Siam B1. Roadcrew B2. Walpurgisnight B3. Bursting Rest B4. Dear Little Friend B5. The producer is Ron Haffkine, a US record producer/composer and manager of Dr. Hook & The Medicine Sho. “Sexy Eyes” is a single cut from the album “Sometimes You Win” released in the early 1980s. Deodato”s second album, ““Rhapsody in Blue”, released in 1973, included songs such as George Gershwin”s ““Rhapsody In Blue”, Maurice Ravel”s ““Pavane for a Dead Princess”, and The Moody Blues’ ““Satin Night” with Deodato”s style arrangements. Tracklist A1. Nights In White Satin A2. Pavane For A Dead Princess A3. Skyscrapers B1. Super Strut B2. The first and second songs on Side A are remixes by M&S, a project by UK garage DJ Ricky Morrison and Fran Sidoli. The third track on Side A is a remix by German house group Tiefschwarz. The first song on the B-side is a remix by Miami-born DJ/producer George Acosta. Tracklist A1. Free (M&S Philly Klub Mix) A2. Free (M&S Philly Dub) A3. Free (Tiefschwarz A Capella) B1. Simon Berry is also a member of the trance groups Clanger, Conscious and Union Jack. “Cambodia” was released in 1994 on the UK trance techno label Platipus. Side A is a remix by Simon Berry and Paul Brogden’s project Clanger. B-side is a remix by Tunnel Vision. Tracklist A. Cambodia (Clanger Remix) AA. Tracklist A1. Carnaval De Paris (SRS Mix) A2. Carnaval De Paris (JDS 6\" Mix) B. Carnaval De Paris (Tall Paul Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1613, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/DJ-Nozawa-+-Capital-Ai-Autumn-Oak/", "title": "DJ Nozawa + Capital – Ai Autumn Oak", "body": "DJ NOZAWA is considered one of Japan’s best turntablists. In 1998, he joined the creator group Terracotta Troops led by Shing02, and participated in the release of ““Yokuyokuren’’ in 1999. In 1997 and 1998, he represented DMC Japan for two consecutive years. “Ai / Autumn Oak” is a collaboration between DJ Nozawa and Capital (Jonathan Patterson), released in 2003. Tracklist A1. Ai (Radio Edit) A2. Ai (Album Version) A3. Ai (Instrumental) B1. Autumn Oak (Album Version) B2. Autumn Oak (Instrumental) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1614, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Clivilles-and-Cole-A-Deeper-Love-(A-Deeper-Feeling-Mix)/", "title": "Clivillés & Cole – A Deeper Love (A Deeper Feeling Mix)", "body": "Clivillés & Cole（クリヴィレス＆コール）は、Robert Clivillés（ロバート・クリヴィレス）とDavid Cole （デヴィッド・コール）によるユニット。1980年代後半からUSのレコードプロデューサー、ソングライター、リミキサーとして活躍し1990年代には世界的に成功を収めた。 「A Deeper Love (A Deeper Feeling Mix)」とU2「Pride」のハウスremixはどちらも世界的なヒット曲となった。 Tracklist A. A Deeper Love (A Deeper Feeling Mix) B. Pride (In The Name Of Love) (MLK 12'' Remix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1615, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Bruno-Pronsato-Wuorinen-Live-In-Cascadia/", "title": "Bruno Pronsato – Wuorinen Live In Cascadia", "body": "Bruno Pronsato (Steven Ford) is an American DJ/producer living in Berlin. “Wuorinen / Live In Cascadia” was released in 2005 by Orac Records, a Seattle-based label that releases experimental to minimal dance floor techno. The second track on Side A is a remix by Michel Baumann, a DJ/producer based in Stuttgart, Germany. Tracklist A1. Wuorinen A2. Wuorinen (Jackmate Remix) B1. Live In Cascadia Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1616, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Araknofobia-Arachnophobia/", "title": "Araknophobia – Arachnophobia", "body": "Araknophobia is an electronic music group formed by UK house music DJ/producers Jon Pearn, Michael Gray, Cino Berigliano, and Nick Ratcliffe. “Arachnophobia” is Araknophobia’s debut single and their signature song. Also active as Friends Of Matthew (FOM). Tracklist A. Arachnophobia (I Want You) AA. Arachnophobia (Black Widow) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1617, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/A-Hundred-Birds-Black-Water/", "title": "A Hundred Birds – Black Water", "body": "A Hundred Birds is a Japanese orchestral band that was formed in 1996 around DJ YOKU and plays house music with an orchestral band. “Black Water” was released in 2006 from the label “WAVE MUSIC” run by François Kevorkian (Francois K.). Participating members ・Omae Chizuru ・Shigeki Tamura ・Noriaki Yoshida ・Kazunori Sato ・Shinobu Kinugawa ・Terry Forsythe ・Katsuki Nakajima ・Tadashi Sato ・Katsuhiro Idomoto ・Kazutake Takeuchi ・Ogimi Gen ・Kazuhiro Takagi ・Kazumi Totaka ・Makoto Dochi etc. Tracklist A. The producer is 95 South, a US hip hop group from Florida. Tracklist A1. Tootsee Roll (Quiet Storm Club Mix) A2. Tootsee Roll (Quiet Storm Mix) B1. Tootsee Roll (Set It Off Club Mix) B2. Tracklist A1. T. Mayujumi –スポーツ行進曲 ～ ビート・ジョンズ・オーケストラ = NTV Sports March A2. Takao Kuramochi –実況放送 ～ ジャンボ鶴田対ミル・マスカラス Part I A3. Jigsaw –仮面貴族ミル・マスカラスのテーマ～スカイ・ハイ = Sky High A4. Takao Kuramochi –実況放送 ～ ジャンボ鶴田対ミル・マスカラス Part II A5. Funk Machine –ジャンボ鶴田のテーマ 「チャイニーズ・カン・フー」 ～ バンザイ = Chinese Kung Fu A6. Takao Kuramochi –実況放送～ビル・ロビンソン対アブドーラ・ザ・ブッチャー A7. Biddu Orchestra–ビル・ロビンソンのテーマ 「人間風車」～カール・ダグラス = Blue Eyed Soul A8. Pink Floyd–ザ・ブッチャーのテーマ 「吹けよ風、呼べよ嵐」～L.A.トランプス = One Of These Days B1. Jigsaw –覆面兄弟 「マスカラス・ブラース」のテーマ～ジグソー　 など Purchase on Mercari" }, { "id": 1621, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Underworld-Cowgirl-Rez/", "title": "Underworld – Cowgirl Rez", "body": "“Cowgirl” released in 1994 and “Rez” released in 1993 are Underworld’s signature songs of the 90s. “Cowgirl” is a distinctive track that combines an emotional melody with electronic sounds. “Rez” is a fusion of high-energy techno beats and house music, both of which are considered classics of the era. Tracklist A. Cowgirl B. Rez Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1622, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/U.S.U.R.A.-Open-Your-Mind/", "title": "U.S.U.R.A. – Open Your Mind", "body": "“U.S.U.R.A.” is an Italian techno music project by Claudio Varola, Michele Comis, and Elisa Spreafichi who were active in the 1990s. Released in 1992, “Open Your Mind” is an early 90’s techno anthem that was frequently played at clubs and festivals at the time, featuring a light beat that combines elements of techno, house, and dance, and catchy vocals. Tracklist A1. Open Your Mind A2. What You Gonna Do About My Love B1. Sweat B2. Drive Me Crazy C1. Tear It Up! C2. Listen To My Prayer D1. Come Bring Me D2. You Are My Rhythm D3. Sweat (Soakin' Wet) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1623, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/RytmihairiovAmen-The-End-Of-Evolution/.-/.Is-Round-The-Corner/", "title": "RytmihairiovAmen – The End Of Evolution... ...Is Round The Corner", "body": "Rytmifäärä は、1988年に結成されたヘルシンキ出身のデスコア/ハードコア/メタルバンド。Amenは、フィンランドのハードコアパンクバンド。 Tracklist A1. They A2. How Much Longer A3. Friends Of The Past A4. Threat A5. Reality Of War A6. Disease Of Mankind A7. Too Tired To Preach A8. Tomorrow - Brings The Sorrow A9. Fear... A10. Selfish Pit B1. Astradyne (Instrumental) A2. New Europeans A3. Private Lives A4. Passing Strangers A5. Sleepwalk B1. Mr. X B2. Western Promise B3. Vienna B4. All Stood Still メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1646, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Gang-Barricada-Rumble-Beat/", "title": "The Gang – Barricada Rumble Beat", "body": "The Gang is an Italian punk band from Filottrano. The first and sixth songs on Side A feature UK singer-songwriter Billy Bragg on guitar and vocals. The third song on side A and the sixth song on side B are performed by American harmonica player Andy J. Forest. Tracklist A1. Goin’ To The Crossroads A2. Blue Message A3. Side A is a remix by Finnish trance DJ Darude, who is famous for the track “Sandstorm.” Tracklist A. Touch Me (Darude Sandstorm Remix) B1. Touch Me (Wavestate Remix) B2. The B-side “Sunrise (Here I Am) (Instrumental)” is the original version of Scooter”s 2000 single “She”s The Sun” called “Sunrise (Ratty’s Inferno)”. Tracklist A1. Sunrise (Here I Am) (Club Mix) B1. Manix was one of the most important artists in the UK rave scene at the time, which centered around old school breakbeats. This album is highly regarded as one of the band”s masterpieces, and in particular, ““Just Between You and Me” and ““Sign of the Gypsy Queen” were commercially successful and are still famous as April Wine”s signature songs. The album”s success increased the band”s international profile and established them as an important part of the Canadian rock scene. Tracklist A1. All Over Town A2. Tellin' Me Lies A3. Sign Of The Gypsy Queen A4. Just Between You And Me A5. Wanna Rock A6. Caught In The Crossfire B1. Future Tense B2. Big City Girls B3. Crash And Burn B4. Bad Boys B5. Wonderland Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1675, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Binary-Finary-2000/", "title": "Binary Finary – 2000", "body": "Binary Finary is a UK trance music duo formed by Matt Rankin and Stuart Matheson. They were active in the 1990s and released many songs that are known as trance classics. Released in 2000, “2000” was frequently played in clubs and festivals and was a huge success in the trance scene at the time. The B-side is a remix by Ferry Corsten and DJ Tiësto’s Dutch trance project Gouryella. Tracklist A. 2000 (Jam X & DuMond's Rmx) B. 2000 (Gouryella Rmx) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1676, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/All-Saints-Pure-Shores-(The-Mixes)/", "title": "All Saints – Pure Shores (The Mixes)", "body": "The first track on side A is a remix by UK DJ/producer/sound designer Tom Middleton, also known as Cosmos. The second track on Side A is a remix by Karl Clive Gordon, aka K-Gee, a former member of Outlaw Posse and Brothers Like Outlaw. The B-side is a remix by Mark Stent, a UK record producer and mixing engineer who has worked with many international artists including Marshmello, U2, Beyoncé, Björk, Depeche Mode, Echo & the Bunnymen, Grimes, and Ed Sheeran. Tracklist A1. Pure Shores (Cosmos Mix) A2. Pure Shores (2 Da Beach Don't Stop Remix) B1. Pure Shores (Original) B2. Cotton Eye Joe (Madcow Mix) A2. Cotton Eye Joe (Radio Version) A3. Cotton Eye Joe (Armand's Dosey-Doe Mix) A4. Cotton Eye Joe (Armand's Instrumental) B1. Cotton Eye Joe (Overworked Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1678, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Ultradyne-Unknown-Works/", "title": "Ultradyne – Unknown Works", "body": "Ultradyne（ウルトラダイン）は、Dennis RichardsonとFrank de GroodtによるUSテクノミュージック・プロジェクト。Majestic12名義でも活動。 Ultradyneは、1990年代に活躍したデトロイトテクノとエレクトロニックミュージックのサウンドを追求するグループで、エネルギッシュでダンサブルな要素を持ちながらも、アブストラクトで実験的な要素も含んでおり、テクノやエレクトロニックミュージックのファンから高い評価を受けていました。 「Unknown Works」は、Daz Quayle主宰のUKエレクトロ/IDMレーベルSCSI-AVから2002年にリリース。 Tracklist A1. Tangible–Theory Proliferation (Ultradyne Remix) A2. Ultradyne–Fantasy Era B1. Ultradyne–Society @ Work B2.
