Tracklist A. Voodoochild B. Angel Dust Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1868, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Paolo-Mojo-1983/", "title": "Paolo Mojo – 1983", "body": "“1983” by Paolo Mojo While the original itself is a great piece of electronic music, this remix takes the track to a completely different level. At an incredible 12 minutes long, it has a hypnotic effect that actually makes you want the track to last another 12 minutes. The build-up is quite long, but it has a great melody and ends in complete chaos. Tracklist A. 1983 (Original Mix) B. 1983 (Eric Prydz Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1869, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Panjabi-MC-Mundian-To-Bach-Ke/", "title": "Panjabi MC – Mundian To Bach Ke", "body": "“Mundian To Bach Ke” is a Bangla music song produced by British musician Panjabi MC, with vocals and lyrics provided by Punjabi artist Labh Janjua. This song was created by Panjabi MC in Birmingham, England for his 1998 album Legalised. After its release as a single in November 2002, “Mundian To Bach Ke” topped the singles charts in Italy and Wallonia, and also achieved high rankings in many other countries. A remixed version featuring American rapper Jay-Z, released in 2003, also achieved high rankings in North America and Australia. The song became one of the best-selling singles of all time, selling over 10 million copies worldwide. Tracklist A. Mundian To Bach Ke (Main Mix) B1. Mundian To Bach Ke (Switch Mix) B2. Mundian Breaks Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1870, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Onnazae-Dark-Knight-EP/", "title": "Onnazae – Dark Knight EP", "body": "“Dark Knight EP” is This is an EP by Onnazae, whose real name is Pete Prezzano, released by the label “Subtitled Records”. Tracklist A. Dark Knight B1. Take Easy B2. Take Easy (Edit) Purchase on Mercari" }, { "id": 1871, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Necton-Mindboggler-EP/", "title": "Necton – Mindboggler EP", "body": "This is an EP by Necton released in 2000 by the German label “Spirit Zone Recordings”. Necton is an electronic music project from Copenhagen, Denmark. This project was formed in 1997. In 2005, Martin Stääf decided to leave the group and focus on his own project, Liquid Stranger. Since then, Necton has become Patrik Olsén’s solo project, specializing in progressive/psychedelic tech-trance. Tracklist A. Mindboggler B. Tracklist A. Clocks (Jakob Carrison Electro Remix) Purchase on Mercari" }, { "id": 1878, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Aquasky-Tranquility-Kauna/", "title": "Aquasky – Tranquility Kauna", "body": "This is an EP by Aquasky released in 1996 on the UK label “Moving Shadow”. Aquasky have worked with 4/4 aliases Black Noise, such as Southern Fried and Wearhouse Music, but this time they return to their roots with a track that takes them back to their Acid House days. A must-hear EP from this era, from this trio whose career spanned acid, jungle, drum and bass, breakbeat, and now encompasses all forms of bass music. Tracklist X. Tranquility Y. Kauna Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1879, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Toco-Guarapiranga/", "title": "Toco – Guarapiranga", "body": "“Toco – Guarapiranga” is a song/EP work by Toco (Tomaz di Cunto), a singer-songwriter based in Florence, Italy. The ““Dub’’ version of the EP (Gerardo Frisina Dub) is a club/dancefloor mix with an emphasis on rhythm and spatial effects, with a tempo of around 120 bpm. “Remix” is an arrangement that maintains a more Brazilian rhythm while still retaining a jazz structure, and is a reinterpretation of the characteristics of the original.The original mix has a relatively restrained composition, and a sound composition that brings Brazilian musical elements such as singing and guitar/percussion instruments to the fore. Tracklist A. Guarapiranga (Gerardo Frisina Dub) B1. Guarapiranga (Gerardo Frisina Remix) B2. Guarapiranga (Original Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1880, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Leroy-Hanghofer-Bathroomboogie/", "title": "Leroy Hanghofer – Bathroomboogie", "body": "このEPは、非常にファンキー＆素晴らしくクリエイティブで奇抜な雰囲気があり、微妙なユーモアも感じられます。 しかし、太いベースラインとグシャグシャとしたシンセサイザーが、すべてをしっかりとグルーブさせ、楽しく進行します。 Tracklist A1. Overtüre A2. Bathroomboogie B1. Bathroomboogie (DJ Chloé Rmx) B2. Tracklist A. Agharta - The City Of Shamballa (Subterranean World) (Original) B1. Agharta - The City Of Shamballa (Subterranean World) (Dr. Rhythm's Higher State Of Trommelwirbel) B2. Agharta - The City Of Shamballa (Subterranean World) (Accapella) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1889, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Zombie-Nation-Kernkraft-400/", "title": "Zombie Nation – Kernkraft 400", "body": "“Kernkraft 400” (German: Kernkraft 400) is a song released by the German techno group Zombie Nation, and is the first single released from their album “Leichenschmaus”. Released in 1999, it peaked at number 22 in Germany in February 2000. It reached the top 10 in Belgium and the Netherlands, and debuted at number 2 in the UK, selling over 400,000 copies and receiving a gold disc certification from the British Recording Industry Association. The song is widely used as a cheering song at sports stadiums around the world (baseball, basketball, American football, ice hockey, etc.), and was ranked 8th on Sports Illustrated’s 2014 Top 10 Stadium Anthems list. In Japan, it became widely known after Yokohama DeNA BayStars pitcher Yasuaki Yamazaki used it as the song when he took the mound, and because Rui Hachimura of the Japanese national basketball team was rooting for the famous Gonzaga University team, where he was a member at the time. Tracklist A. Kernkraft 400 (DJ Gius Remix) B. Kernkraft 400 (Miss Kittin & The Hacker Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1890, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-Raging-Thrash-From-Blind-Vision/", "title": "Various – Raging Thrash From Blind Vision", "body": "「Raging Thrash From Blind Vision」は、 2000年にAnswer Recordsからリリースされたこのレコードは、名古屋のローカルHARDCOREのコンピレーション・アルバム。 Tracklist A1. He is also a producer for labels such as Black Sunshine Records, Afro Art, Out Hear Audio, and Modern Artifacts. Side A is a re-edit of Tumblack - Caraïba, and side B is a re-edit of Richard Evans’ “Capricorn Rising” from his album “Richard Evans”. Tracklist A. Africa (Future Primitive) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1898, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Public-Energy-Slumber-Velocity/", "title": "Public Energy – Slumber Velocity", "body": "“Slumber” features a strong groove and a near-disappearing bass bass, giving way to a minimalistic trance melody before returning to a more intense sound. Additional acid drops are also laced throughout the track. “Velocity”, on the other hand, has a more European style and features drum rolls. Tracklist A. Slumber B. Velocity Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1899, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Propagandhi-How-To-Clean-Everything/", "title": "Propagandhi – How To Clean Everything", "body": "“How to Clean Everything” is the debut album by punk rock band Propagandhi, released in 1993 on Fat Wreck Chords. Mike Daronco of Allmusic said the album was “a fun, lively yet mass-oriented take on ‘Anarchy 101,’” and Ron Knox of Vice Media said in 2016 that the album was designed to pose a challenge to listeners. Tracklist A1. Anti-Manifesto A2. Head? Chest? Or Foot? A3. Hate, Myth, Muscle, Etiquette A4. Showdown (G.E./P.) A5. Ska Sucks A6. Middle Finger Response B1. Stick The Fucking Flag Up Your Goddam Ass, You Sonofabitch B2. Haillie Sallasse, Up Your Ass B3. Fuck Machine B4. This Might Be Satire B5. Who Will Help Me Bake This Bread? B6. I Want U 2 Vant Me Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1900, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Plutocracy-Dankstahz/", "title": "Plutocracy – Dankstahz", "body": "「Dankstahz」は、 1996年にドイツのレーベル「Anomie Records」からリリースされたカリフォルニアで結成されたグラインドコアバンド「Plutocracy」による10インチレコードです。 Tracklist A1. Intro A2. Jailed A3. Mizer A4. Guilt A5. Good Times A6. Blurred A7. Dankstahz A8. Two Sided Tale B1. Class Tension B2. Rolling With Dank B3. Tutu, I Love You B4. Crust....Not!!! B5. DV8 B6. Snitch B7. Erupt B8. Outro メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1901, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Out-Of-Tune-Generation-Cine-Techno-Directors-Cut/", "title": "Out Of Tune Generation – Cine Techno Director's Cut", "body": "Out Of Tune Generationは高浪敬太郎（ピチカート・ファイブ）のプロジェクト。A1はモンド映画、「Sweden: Heaven and Hell」の挿入曲「マナ・マナ」のハウスカバー。 A2は、ギリシャ・イギリス映画「魚が出てきた日」のカバー。 B1のLinus & Lucyは、ピーナッツ（特にスヌーピーのメリー・クリスマス）で頻繁に流れるビンス・ガラルディが1964年に発表した楽曲Linus & Lucy（ライナス・アンド・ルーシー）のカバー。B2はイギリス映画「唇からナイフ」のカバー。 Tracklist A1. Mah-Na Mah-Na (Heaven And Hell In B#) A2. The Day The Fish Came Out (Electra Mix) B1. Linus & Lucy (Listen To My Face Mix) B2. Modesty (Mode-Esty Dub) メルカリで購入" }, { "id": 1902, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/No-More-Mr-Nice-Guy-Fixation/", "title": "No More Mr Nice Guy – Fixation", "body": "“Fixation” is an EP by Pete Lazonby and Tim Fielding’s unit No More Mr Nice Guy, released in 1995 on the UK label “:Confusion Records.” Tracklist A. Fixation B. Space Terrace Purchase on Mercari" }, { "id": 1903, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Murphy-Brown-Energizer-2002-Part-II/", "title": "Murphy Brown – Energizer 2002 Part II", "body": "“Energizer 2002 Part II” is This is an EP from the project “Murphy Brown” by Michael Marc Ott, whose real name is Michael Marc Ott, released in 2002 on the German label “Soundwave Music”. Tracklist A1. Energizer (DJ Dean Remix) B1. Energizer (Original Mix) B2. Roots Of Darkness (DJ Genetic Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1904, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Modomonomusik-and-Bee-Silicon-Valley/", "title": "Modomonomusik and Bee – Silicon Valley", "body": "“Silicon Valley” is This is an EP by the unit “Modomonomusik & Bee” by Kamue Flash Bee and Logic Sisters, released in 2001 on a German label. Tracklist A. Devoice B1. Da Da B2. Ebird Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1905, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Mille-and-Mr.-Hirsch-Jazzhatz/", "title": "Mille and Mr. Hirsch – Jazzhatz", "body": "“Jazzhatz” is This is an EP by Mille & Mr. Hirsch, a unit composed of Rolf Hans Michael Fischer and Peter W. Hirsch, released in 2000 on the German label “Jetlag”. Tracklist A. Jazzhatz (Play It Loud) B1. Jazzhatz (Original) B2. One More Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1906, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Menno-de-Jong-Tundra/", "title": "Menno de Jong – Tundra", "body": "Menno de Jongは、オランダのトランスDJおよびプロデューサーであり、トランスミュージックのジャンルで活動しています。 Menno de Jongの音楽は、トランスミュージックのファンにとってはおなじみであり、エネルギッシュなサウンドと美しいメロディが特徴です。 Tracklist A. Tundra (Fierce Dub) AA. Tundra (Mark Otten's Energetic Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1907, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Marco-Bailey-Ipanema-EP/", "title": "Marco Bailey – Ipanema EP", "body": "“Ipanema EP” is an EP by Marco Bailey released on the Swedish label “Zync” in 2001. The source of the vocal sample is “Mamborama - Cuba Te Llama”. Tracklist A1. Ipanema (Original Mix) A2. Ipanema (Redhead Remix) B1. Edge Level B2. Shinjuku-ku Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1908, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/M.O.P.-Ante-Up-(Robbing-Hoodz-Theory)/", "title": "M.O.P. – Ante Up (Robbing-Hoodz Theory)", "body": "M.O.P. (short for Mash Out Posse) is an American hip-hop duo formed by rappers Billy Danz and Lil Fame. The success of the album “Warriorz” raised M.O.P.’s profile and garnered attention on mainstream radio. However, due to problems with the record company, he faced difficulties around 2002, and was subsequently picked up by Roc-A-Fella Records, where he also appeared on Jay-Z’s “The Blueprint: The Gift & the Curse”. Tracklist A1. Radio Version A2. Explicit Version B1. Instrumental B2. A Cappella Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1909, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/M.E.S.H.-Meet-Every-Situation-Head-On/", "title": "M.E.S.H. – Meet Every Situation Head On", "body": "M.E.S.H. is a group consisting of Richard Norris and David Ball. They worked together as M.E.S.H, one of the groups formed by members of Psychic TV in 1988 for the fake compilation Jack The Tab – Acid Tablets Volume One. M.E.S.H. has since changed its name to The Grid. Tracklist A. Meet Every Situation Head On (DJ Jackmaster Tab Fitness Mix) AA. Meet Every Situation Head On (DJ Jackmaster Tab Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1910, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Londonbeat-Ive-Been-Thinking-About-You/", "title": "Londonbeat – I\"ve Been Thinking About You", "body": "Londonbeat is a British dance-pop band that produced many pop and dance hits in the early 1990s. Members are Jimmy Helms, Jimmy Chambers, and Charles Pierrer. “I’ve Been Thinking About You” is their signature song and reached number 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 and Hot Dance Music/Club Play charts in 1991. Tracklist A1. I've Been Thinking About You (Def 12\" Mix) A2. I've Been Thinking About You (Red Zone Mix) A3. I've Been Thinking About You (Reprise) B1. I've Been Thinking About You (Vocal Dub) B2. I've Been Thinking About You (The Eclipse Mix) B3. I've Been Thinking About You (Trak Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1911, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Lani-Our-Way-To-The-Sun-EP/", "title": "Lani – Our Way To The Sun EP", "body": "“Our Way To The Sun EP” is an EP by the unit “Lani” by Tim Kaelen and Tom Moons, released in 2003 on the Belgian label “Kairoo Records”. Tracklist A. Skycontact (Full Moon Remix) B. The Loss Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1912, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/LSG-Netherworld/", "title": "LSG – Netherworld", "body": "「Netherworld」は、1997年にUKのレーベル「Hooj Choons」よりリリースされたOliver Liebによるプロジェクト「LSG」のEPです。 Tracklist A. Netherworld (Jules Verne Mix) B. Netherworld (DJ Randy's Smoke Free Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1913, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Joe-Smooth-Disco-Acid-4/", "title": "Joe Smooth – Disco Acid 4", "body": "“Disco Acid 4” is an EP by Joe Smooth released in 2003 on the label “Trax Records”. Tracklist A1. Alternative3 A2. Forever My Love B1. Faster Than Light B2. Walking Into Sunshine Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1914, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Headshop-4-Sale/", "title": "Headshop – 4 Sale!", "body": "Headshopは、90年代から活動しているエレクトロニック・ハードコア・ アシッド ・テクノ アーティストOlaf Pozsgay（The Viking/Dirty Dozen）のプロジェクト。 Tracklist A. Universe B1. Floorlifter B2. Xenomorph メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1915, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Goldie-Feat.-KRS-One-Digital/", "title": "Goldie Feat. KRS One – Digital", "body": "“Digital” is a song by British musician Goldie featuring American rapper KRS-One and was released as the first single from Goldie’s 1998 album Saturnz Return. The song reached number 13 on the UK Singles Chart on November 1, 1997, making it his highest charting record, along with Goldie’s “Temper Temper” (along with a song featuring Noel Gallagher). The single was influenced by the then-emerging speed garage and was one of the first attempts to fuse drum and bass and rap. Tracklist A. Digital (Original Mix) Featuring – KRS One B. Digital (Armand Van Helden's Speed Garage Mix) Remix, Co-producer [Additional Production] – Armand Van Helden Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1916, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Girl-Eats-Boy-Thrilled-By-Velocity-and-Distortion/", "title": "Girl Eats Boy – Thrilled By Velocity and Distortion", "body": "Girl Eats Boy is a project by British producer/DJ Lol Hammond. “Girl Eats Boy – Thrilled By Velocity & Distortion” was released by Hydrogen Dukebox in 1998. Tracklist A1. Napalm In Bohemia A2. Girl Eats Boy B1. Chemical Phunk B2. Blue Absence Of Angels C1. Sound Bites C2. Moist Babe Hates The Government D1. Rude Girl Steppin' D2. Ram Raid Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1917, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Gigolo-I-Wanna-Tell-You/", "title": "Gigolo – I Wanna Tell You", "body": "Gigoloは、Mo’ Hop Recordsのオーナーであるエレクトロニック・ダンス・プロデューサー、 Edwin Maduro(エドウィン・マドゥロ)の別名義。Edwin Maduroが使用する別名義には、Breadth Of View、Eddie Maduro、Eddie Satin、Gigolo、Monolith、The Visionなどがある。 Tracklist A1. I Wanna Tell You (Anthem) B1. I Wanna Tell You (Instrumental) B2. I Wanna Tell You (Anthem Dub) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1918, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Gay-Marvine-Secret-Mixes-Fixes-Vol.-9-The-3rd-Gender/", "title": "Gay Marvine – Secret Mixes Fixes Vol. 9 - The 3rd Gender", "body": "“Secret Mixes Fixes Vol. 9 - The 3rd Gender” is an EP by Gay Marvine, a project by Chuck Hampton released in 2008 on the label “Secret Mixes Fixes”. Tracklist A1. Gay Marvine–I Who Have Nothing A2. Gay Marvine–Band Of Gold B1. Gay Marvine–Doyouwannafuck? Do You? B2. Gay Marvine–Baby, Let's Trip Out Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1919, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Fantasia-Free-Yourself/", "title": "Fantasia – Free Yourself", "body": "Charles Spencer＆David HarnessによるFantasia – Free YourselfのハウスREMIX。 Tracklist A. Free Yourself B. Free Yourself メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1920, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Eric-Prydz-Pjanoo/", "title": "Eric Prydz – Pjanoo", "body": "“Pjanoo” is a keyboard-based house track by Swedish DJ and producer Eric Prydz. The song received moderate airplay on British radio stations and was actively used by BBC Radio 1 in their “Radio 1 Big Weekend” and “Weekend in Ibiza” advertisements. The single reached number 6 on the Swedish singles chart. However, “Pjanoo” was a success outside of Sweden, particularly in the United Kingdom, where it reached number two on the UK singles chart and topped the country’s dance chart for ten weeks. Tracklist A1. Pjanoo (High Contrast Remix) B1. Pjanoo (Afterlife Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1921, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Elevate-Virtual-Dreams-All-I-Need/", "title": "Elevate – Virtual Dreams All I Need", "body": "Side A, “Virtual Dreams,” features a powerful 909 drum sound, followed by an impressive synth riff that leads into a trance-like, pad-filled breakdown. The synth riff then returns, leading into a powerful chorus. The second breakdown is even more detailed, with the return of the tasteful piano and lead synth with a more sophisticated melody. Virtual Dreams is a powerful track and a must-listen. Tracklist A. Virtual Dreams B. All I Need Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1922, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Diephuis-Inside-Me/", "title": "Diephuis – Inside Me", "body": "Diephuis (Barend-Jan Beljaars) is a DJ/producer from Rotterdam, Netherlands who has been active since the 90s. We specialize in deep and soulful house music influenced by disco, techno, soul, afro, funk, and jazz. Tracklist A. Inside Me B. Inside Me (Instrumental Dub) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1923, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/De-Tune-Get-Down/", "title": "De Tune – Get Down", "body": "“Get Down” is an EP by De Tune released in 1995 on the Groove On label. Tracklist A1. Get Down (Club Mix) A2. Get Down (Theee Mix) B1. Get Down (Get On Up Mix) B2. Get Down (Drums Til The End) B3. Get Down (On It Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1924, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/D.A.V.E.-The-Drummer-+-Pattrix-Hydraulix-15/", "title": "D.A.V.E. The Drummer + Pattrix – Hydraulix 15", "body": "D.A.V.E. The Drummer is the alias of Henry Cullen, a British techno DJ and producer who runs Hydraulix, Apex Recordings, and Mutate To Survive. Henry Cullen and Pattrix (Patrick Blanchard) also operate under the name Mutate To Survive. Tracklist A. Untitled B. Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1925, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Culture-Beat-No-Deeper-Meaning/", "title": "Culture Beat – No Deeper Meaning", "body": "“No Deeper Meaning” was recorded by Jay Supreme and Nosie Katzmann’s German Eurodance band Culture Beat and released as the fourth and final single from their first studio album, Horizon (1991). The female vocals were provided by Lana Earl and reached number 4 in the Netherlands and number 9 in Portugal. Outside Europe, it ranked 3rd on Canada’s RPM Dance/Urban chart. The song is about a woman who doesn’t want to go to a nightclub and start a relationship, she just wants to dance. The chorus samples the 1983 song “Change” by the British rock group Tears for Fears. Tracklist A1. No Deeper Meaning (Club Mix) A2. No Deeper Meaning (House Mix) A3. No Deeper Meaning (Airplay Single Mix) B1. No Deeper Meaning (51 W. 52nd Street Mix) B2. No Deeper Meaning (Technology Mix) B3. No Deeper Meaning (LP Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1926, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Chayell-Rio/", "title": "Chayell – Rio", "body": "“Rio” is an EP by Peter Bonne and Pick A Number’s unit Chayell, released on the label “Subway” in 1988. Tracklist A. Do You Wanna (DJ's Free Rap) B. Breakfast In Rio (Hey That's Our Rap) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1927, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Bio-Tonic-Rock-Da-People/", "title": "Bio-Tonic – Rock Da People", "body": "“Rock Da People” is This is an EP by France’s psychedelic trance band ““Bio-Tonic” from Reims, released by the German label ““Spirit Zone Recordings” in 2001. Tracklist A. Space Vibes B1. The Dark Breath B2. Big Steel Balls Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1928, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Arrow-Groove-Master/", "title": "Arrow – Groove Master", "body": "Alphonsus Cassell, also known as Arrow, was a Montserratian calypso and soca musician and the first soca superstar from Montserrat. Their 1982 song “Hot Hot Hot” is famous as an international hit. Side A Groove Master (Acid Soca House Dub) is a popular song among house music and club music lovers. Tracklist A1. Groove Master (Popstand Party Remix) A2 Groove Master (Acid Soca House Dub) A3. Groove Master (7\" Uptown Edit) B1. Groove Master (7\" Downtown Edit) B2. Groove Master (LP Version) B3. Groove Master (Instrumental Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1929, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Tam-Arrow-One-Shot-Girl/", "title": "Tam Arrow – One Shot Girl", "body": "“One Shot Girl” is This is an EP by Tam Arrow (real name Claudio Magnani) released on the Italian label “Live Music” in 2001. Tracklist A1. Joe Banana–Bang Bang Bang (Extended Version) A2. Tam Arrow–One Shot Girl (Extended Version) B1. Beat Man–Future Boy (Extended Version) B2. P. Stone–Kosmic Woofer (Extended Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1930, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Stardust-Music-Sounds-Better-With-You/", "title": "Stardust – Music Sounds Better With You", "body": "Stardust is a unit consisting of Thomas Bangalter (Daft Punk), DJ Alan Braxe, and Benjamin Diamond. “Music Sounds Better With You”, released in 1998, samples Chaka Khan”s “Fate” and is Stardust”s only song. “Music Sounds Better With You” is highly acclaimed as a masterpiece of house music that pursues fun on the dance floor, with catchy melodies, funky rhythms, and vocal sampling. This song is a classic for fans of house music and electronic dance music. Tracklist A. Music Sounds Better With You Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1931, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Slyder-Neo-(The-One)/", "title": "Slyder – Neo (The One)", "body": "Slyder is an American dance music duo consisting of Chad Petree and Jeremy Dawson. They are also members of the electronica/rock group Shiny Toy Guns, also known as R.R.D.S., cloud2ground, and Mirror Machines. Neo (The One) was featured in the 2001 video game Grand Theft Auto III (GTA3). Tracklist A. Neo (The One) B. Neo (The One) (R.R.D.S. Chewable Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1932, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Slam-This-World-(Remixes)/", "title": "Slam – This World (Remixes)", "body": "The Wighnomy Brothers remix is ​​great, the original being typical British synthetic music with slightly trance-y pop/house vocals, sonically transformed enough, filtered and subtly altered to become a very sharp and emotive stadium micro-house anthem for the 22nd century. Wighnomy Bros has accomplished this highly unthinkable. Created hip and thrilling stadium music. Slam are a Scottish DJ-producer duo (Orde Meikle, Stuart McMillan) from Glasgow. Co-founder of Soma Quality Recordings and promoter of the Atlantis parties (1989-1992) and Slam parties (1991-) in Glasgow. We met in Sheffield in 1986. At the time, Ord was studying geography at university and Stuart was working in a bar. The group is named after Phuture’s legendary track. Tracklist A. This World (Wighnomy Bros. And Robag Wruhme Bukkelfipps Remix) AA. This World (Hugg And Pepp Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1933, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/S-Moore-Featuring-M.C.-ROKK-Touch-Me-(II-Time)/", "title": "S Moore Featuring M.C. ROKK – Touch Me (II Time)", "body": "“Touch Me (II Time)” is an EP by S Moore, real name Sandro Murru, released on the Italian label “Hot Trax” in 1999. Tracklist A1. Touch Me (Summer Mix) A2. Touch Me (ROKK \"Shut Up\") B1. Touch Me (The EM Soft Style) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1934, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Norman-Chung-Debut/", "title": "Norman Chung – Debut", "body": "有名なテクノレーベルSinoから2006年にリリースされた、Norman Chung(ノーマン・チャン)のデビューEP。 スイス出身のミニマルテクノ／デトロイトテクノシーンで注目されているDJ Deetron(ディートロン)とのコラボ曲は必聴。 Tracklist A. F1 (Deetron Edit/ディートロン Edit) B1. Get Down B2. Sense メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1935, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Nando-Music-Go-Wild-Love-Killer/", "title": "Nando – Music Go Wild Love Killer", "body": "Fernando Bonini, also known as Nando, is an Italian guitarist, singer-songwriter, and vocalist. He has been a touring member of Vasco Rossi since 1993 and collaborates with various Italian musicians and singers. Tracklist A1. Music Go Wild (Extended Mix) A2. Music Go Wild (I Love Mini Mix) B1. Love Killer (Extended Mix) B2. Love Killer (Bonus Track) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1936, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Murcof-Ulysses/", "title": "Murcof – Ulysses", "body": "Murcof is a project by Fernando Corona, one of Mexico’s leading electronic musicians and producers who also appears on Mutek, Sonar, Atonal, etc. “Ulysses” was released by Leaf, a long-established electronic music label. Tracklist A. Ulysses B. Urano Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1937, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Lennie-De-Ice-We-Are-I.E.-(Part-2-Of-2.-Hybrid-Remixes)/", "title": "Lennie De Ice – We Are I.E. (Part 2 Of 2. Hybrid Remixes)", "body": "Lennie De Ice – We Are I.E. (Part 2 Of 2. Hybrid Remixes) Tracklist A1. We Are I.E. (Hybrid's Pumping Mix) B1. We Are I.E. (Hybrid's Lite Mix) B2. We Are I.E. (Hybrid's Dark Mix) “We Are I.E.” is a song by British breakbeat and hardcore producer Lennie De Ice (real name Lenworth Green). Hybrid remixes the jungle classic. Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1938, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Lennie-De-Ice-We-Are-I.E.-(Part-1-of-2)/", "title": "Lennie De Ice – We Are I.E. (Part 1 of 2)", "body": "「We Are I.E.」は、イギリスのブレイクビート&ハードコアプロデューサー、Lennie De Ice(レニー・デ・アイス　本名レンワース・グリーン)の楽曲です。 Tracklist A1. We Are I.E. (Johan S Toxic Mix) A2. We Are I.E. (Johan S Filterman E-Dub) B1. We Are I.E. (Bulletproof Underground Dub) B2. We Are I.E. (Original) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1939, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/King-Kobra-I-Want-Your-Sex/", "title": "King Kobra – I Want Your Sex", "body": "This is a single from “King Kobra”, a project by his real name David Brian Srb. David Brian Srb was born in Omaha, Nebraska, and is a multi-instrumentalist, singer-songwriter, recording engineer, and music producer. Based in Italy from the 1980s to 1998, he sang many Eurobeat songs under various aliases. He currently works as the Technical Director and Auditorium Manager at Christian Heritage Academy in Northfield, Illinois. Tracklist A. I Want Your Sex (Dance Mix) B1. I Want Your Sex (Bonus Mix) B2. I Want Your Sex (Radio Edit) B3. I Want Your Sex (Playback) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1940, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Jaimy-Lost-Inside/", "title": "Jaimy – Lost Inside", "body": "In 1990, Jaimy was one of the first Dutch producers to successfully make a living from house music. At the age of 19, he signed his first record contract and was picked up by Outland Records in Amsterdam, where he contributed to much of the music released by Outland Studios. Around 1998, I met my musical partner, Kenny D. Production-wise, Jaimy & Kenny D primarily released music on Black Hole Recordings, but also contributed tracks and projects to United Recordings, Combined Forces, and Perfecto. In 2004, Jaimy took the independent route and founded his own label, Fatal Music. A year later, he also founded Drum Mode. Tracklist A1. Lost Inside B1. No Way Out B2. Blow Your Mind Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1941, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Ikarus-7-Days-Out!/", "title": "Ikarus – 7 Days Out!", "body": "IkarusはToru Shimadaのプロジェクトで、彼のレーベルPhilosomatik Records より1998年にリリースされました。 「Ikarus – 7 Days Out!」は、Danny Tenaglia（ダニー テナグリア）, Peter Rauhofer（ピーター ラウホーファー）, Cevin Fisher（セビン フィッシャー） やJunior Vasquez（ジュニア バスケス）など多くのDJがplayしたレコードです。 Tracklist A. Awake From A Dream B. Baby Wants To Go C. Mo ! Wara Okamatique D. A Window To The Future メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1942, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Front-242-Politics-Of-Pressure/", "title": "Front 242 – Politics Of Pressure", "body": "Front242 is an electronic music group formed in Belgium. Front242 pioneered a style of electronic music called electronic body music (EBM), which combines elements of industrial music, synth punk, and dance music, and has had a major influence on various genres such as electronic music and industrial. Tracklist A1. Don't Crash A2. Funkahdafi B. Commando (Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1943, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Foo-Fighters-Confessions/", "title": "Foo Fighters – Confessions", "body": "A house remix of Foo Fighters’ BEST OF YOU single from their 2005 album In Your Honor. Single-sided press. Tracklist A. Best Of You (Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1944, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/F-Untitled/", "title": "F – Untitled", "body": "“F – Untitled” was released in 1998 on the German label Sense Music. F is a project by German DJ and producer Frank Lotz. Tracklist A. Untitled B. Untitled Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1945, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Elektrochemie-LK-Gold/", "title": "Elektrochemie LK – Gold!", "body": "“Gold!” by Elektrochemie LK was released by German label Confused Recordings in 2001. Elektrochemie LK is one of Thomas Schumacher’s solo projects. Tracklist A1. Schall (Album Version) A2. Things Go Wrong II B. Let's Roll C1. Flashback '91 C2. When I Rock (Original 12\" Version) D1. ChiChi D2. Girl! E. Boodie Steil F1. En Route To Narita F2. Ein Nenner Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1946, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Ei-Mori-Vetettem-Violat/", "title": "Ei Mori – Vetettem Violat", "body": "Ei Moriは、Herman Gillis、Jo Casters、Roland Beelenからなるユニットです。 Herman Gillisは18歳のときに最初のバンドである「プリミティフス」を結成しました。彼はそのバンドのためにいくつかの楽器を製作しました。これにはエアスクラッチャーやドラムマシン（自作のドラムパッドを含む）、プリミティフなコンピューターシステム、MIDIなどが含まれています。 Jo Castersは、ベルギーの重要な音楽家兼プロデューサーで、20年以上にわたりベルギーの音楽シーンで重要な役割を果たしてきました。もともとはPoésie Noireの創設者で、その後、ベルギーのトリオ、Morton、Sherman、Belluciの一員でした。 1987年のNew Beat運動の創設者および最も多産なアーティストの一部でした。彼らはさまざまな名前のもとに、1年間で約100の録音をリリースしました。 Tracklist A. Vetettem Violat B. Vetettem Violat (Instrumental) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1947, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Black-Metal-Featuring-Lady-Lust-Show-No-Mercy/", "title": "Black Metal Featuring Lady Lust – Show No Mercy", "body": "“Show No Mercy” is an EP by Black Metal released in 1995 by the Italian label “Bulldozer Records”. You can hear that Juliana sound here. Tracklist A. Show No Mercy (Extended No - Mercy Mix) B1. Show No Mercy (Extended V II Mix) B2. Show No Mercy (Playback) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1948, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/ABC-Zillionaire-(Bond-St.-Mix)/", "title": "ABC – Zillionaire (Bond St. Mix)", "body": "ABC is a pop band formed in Sheffield, England in 1980, best known for their 1980s songs such as “The Look of Love” and “When Smokey Sings.” Since 1997, ABC has been a solo project by singer and founder Martin Fry, collaborating with various musicians. Frye hired Trevor Horn as producer to move in a pop-oriented direction and renamed the group ABC. ABC released their first single, “Tears Are Not Enough”, in November 1981, reaching number 19 on the UK charts. Tracklist A. How To Be A Zillionaire (Bond St. Mix) B1. How To Be A Millionaire $ $ $ $ $ $ $ B2. How To Be A Millionaire Accapella Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1949, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Two-For-Love-Hold-Me/", "title": "Two For Love – Hold Me", "body": "“Hold Me” is an EP from the project Two For Love by Alessia Aquilani, released in 1989 on the Italian label “Euroenergy”. Tracklist A. Hold Me (Extended Version) B1. Hold Me (Radio Version) B2. Hold Me (Dub Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1950, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Technasia-Force/", "title": "Technasia – Force", "body": "“Force” by Technasia can be called a techno anthem. “Force” is a great classic, with the vocals making this typical Technasia track special. Check out the breakbeat mix on the back, it’s worth a listen. Tracklist A1. Force A2. Force (Reprise) B1. Resilience B2. Force (Voxless) Purchase on Mercari https://jp.mercari.com/item/m82234983144?afid=6142608987" }, { "id": 1951, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Talking-Heads-Speaking-In-Tongues/", "title": "Talking Heads – Speaking In Tongues", "body": "Talking Heads’ “Speaking In Tongues” was released in 1983. This album was one of Talking Heads’ most commercially successful releases and marked their musical evolution and innovation. The album is packed with Talking Heads” signature post-punk and new wave elements, combining David Byrne”s vocal style, quirky lyrics, and catchy rhythms and melodies to create a unique sound. It includes many hit songs such as “Burning Down the House” and “This Must Be the Place (Naive Melody).” This album is a must-hear for any Talking Heads fan, and its unique sound and intelligent lyrics make ‘Speaking In Tongues’ a milestone in rock music history. Tracklist A1. Burning Down The House A2. Making Flippy Floppy A3. Girlfriend Is Better A4. Slippery People A5. I Get Wild / Wild Gravity B1. Swamp B2. Moon Rocks B3. Pull Up The Roots B4. This Must Be The Place (Naive Melody) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1952, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Sounds-Of-Life-III/", "title": "Sounds Of Life – III", "body": "“Hidden Rooms” is one of Source Direct’s best amen tunes. This track has been masterfully produced by a number of great producers and will be a perfect dancefloor hit with the first drop. The sharp metallic sound that overrides the rapid amembark is one of the most notable samples and will give you goosebumps. “Spice of Jazz” is also wonderful, and features many breaks. Tracklist a. Hidden Rooms b. A Spice Of Jazz Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1953, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Snuff-Flibbiddydibbiddydob/", "title": "Snuff – Flibbiddydibbiddydob", "body": "「Flibbidydibbidydob」は、イギリスのパンクロックバンド、SnuffによるカバーソングEPで、商業用ジングルやテレビのテーマ曲を含んでいます。 このEPはもともと1990年にWorkers Playtime Recordsからイギリスでリリースされ、後に1996年8月にFat Wreck Chordsから再リリースされました。 Tracklist A1. Rods & Mockers A2. Do Nothing A3. Shake 'N' Black A4. Can't Explain A5. Ecstasy B1. Reach Out B2. Hazy Shade Of Winter B3. Do It Quick B4. City Baby Attacked By Rats B5. Bran Flakes B6. In Sickness & In Health メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1954, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Simon-&-Garfunkel-Sounds-Of-Silence/", "title": "Simon & Garfunkel – Sounds Of Silence", "body": "“Sounds Of Silence” was released in 1966. This album was an important milestone in Simon & Garfunkel’s career, demonstrating their musical maturity and talent. The album includes the hit singles “The Sound of Silence” and “I Am a Rock.” These songs feature a melodic folk sound and the beautiful harmonies of Paul Simon and Art Garfunkel. This album is a timeless work for Simon & Garfunkel fans and folk music lovers alike. Their heart-touching lyrics and beautiful melodies have moved many people and have continued to be loved for a long time. Tracklist A1. The Sounds Of Silence A2. Leaves That Are Green A3. Blessed A4. Kathy's Song A5. Somewhere They Can't Find Me A6. Angie B1. Richard Cory B2. A Most Peculiar Man B3. April Come She Will B4. We've Got A Groovey Thing Goin' B5. I Am A Rock Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1955, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Realside-High-Noon/", "title": "Realside – High Noon", "body": "“High Noon” is an EP by Dominic Stanton & Mark Russell’s unit “Realside” released on the UK label Sirkus in 2002. Tracklist A. High Noon B. High Noon (Maddslinky Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1956, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Motiv-One-Cosmik-Loop-Progression/", "title": "Motiv One – Cosmik Loop Progression", "body": "“Cosmik” has a light rhythm with a nice key break and a slightly jazzy, futuristic sound. It”s not too heavy, and there”s no amen break used here, but it”s a solid track overall. It was also included on Bukem”s first Progression Sessions CD. “Loop Progression” is another great track, starting with a tough, driving beat before gradually emerging as softer keys combine with the chords. A break follows, followed by a huge, truly huge Amen kick and a cosmic style sound, with the bass kicking in for good measure as well. The great part goes through some bridges and chords, followed by an outro beat followed by a heavy amen beat. Tracklist A. Cosmik AA. Loop Progression Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1957, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Milemarker-Future-Isms/", "title": "Milemarker – Future Isms", "body": "Milemarker is a post-hardcore band from North Carolina, USA. Their sound is a mix of styles including experimental electronic, new wave, and alternative rock. Tracklist A1. New Lexicon A2. Make Love To The Camera Obscura A3. Me, Sweatshirt; You, Jacket A4. Home Theatre Made Easy A5. Infant Technology A6. Xanax B1. Address B2. Occupational Hazards B3. Somnambulism B4. Alchemy B5. Engine Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1958, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Markus-Guentner-Audio-Island/", "title": "Markus Guentner – Audio Island", "body": "\"”Audio Island’’ by Markus Guentner is a wonderful double LP. All of the tracks on this two-disc set are slow and deep songs, making it a must-listen. Tracklist A1. Droid Ships A2. Lost Paradise B1. So Well B2. Sleep Well C1. Hooked On Monket Phonics C2. Separate Digits D1. Sunset D2. Tears In Rain Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1959, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Lo-Fidelity-Allstars-Disco-Machine-Gun/", "title": "Lo-Fidelity Allstars – Disco Machine Gun", "body": "“Puppy Phat” from “Lo-Fidelity Allstars - Disco Machine Gun” blurs the line between trip-hop and big beat with its downtempo tempo but thick beat and sleazy bassline. Hidden as a B-side, this song is one of Lo-Fi’s best tracks. Tracklist A. Disco Machine Gun AA1. Disco Machine Gun (Many Tentacles Pimping On The Keys) AA2. Puppy Phat, Number One Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1960, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Ian-Lex-I-Wanna-Be-Your-Man/", "title": "Ian Lex – I Wanna Be Your Man", "body": "This is a single release from the project “Ian Lex” by Rino Facchinetti, released in 1996. Tracklist A. I Wanna Be Your Man (Factory Team Dance Traxx) B1. I Wanna Be Your Man (Dub Traxx) B2. I Wanna Be Your Man (Progressive) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1961, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Hyena-Featuring-Ricky-Trauma-Ive-Got-To-Dance/", "title": "Hyena Featuring Ricky Trauma –I've Got To Dance", "body": "Hyena Featuring Ricky Traumaの「I’ve Got To Dance」は、 B面の「Velvet Mix」がおすすめ。 ルイジ・スタンガによるあまり知られていないプロダクションですが、要チェックなトラックです。 Tracklist A. I've Got To Dance (Techno Mix) B. I've Got To Dance (Velvet Mix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1962, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Frankie-Knuckles-Featuring-Adeva-Whadda-U-Want-(From-Me)/", "title": "Frankie Knuckles Featuring Adeva –Whadda U Want (From Me)", "body": "“Frankie Knuckles Featuring Adeva –Whadda U Want (From Me)” This EP also includes remixes of famous Frankie Knuckles tracks released in 1995. Tracklist A1. Whadda U Want (From Me) (Frankie's Classic Club) A2. Walkin' (Grant Nelson's Divine Gospel Remix) B1. Whadda U Want (From Me) (K-Klass Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1963, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Evelyn-Thomas-Summer-On-The-Beach/", "title": "Evelyn Thomas – Summer On The Beach", "body": "“Evelyn Thomas” is a single by real name Ellen Lucille Thomas, released in 1987 by the UK label “Nightmare Gold Records”. Tracklist A. Summer On The Beach B. Summer On The Beach (Short Version) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1964, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Ellie-Bitches-In-Babylon-Let-Me-Be-Me/", "title": "Ellie – Bitches In Babylon Let Me Be Me", "body": "“Bitches In Babylon Let Me Be Me” is This is Ellie’s EP released by Crue-L in 1997. The A-side includes a remix by Takeshi Kubota, and the B-side is a remix by Shaka Zombie’s Tucchi. Tracklist A1. Bitches In Babylon (クボタタケシ Remix) A2. Bitches In Babylon (クボタタケシ Remix - Instrumental) A3. Bitches In Babylon (クボタ Flying Killaahh Remix) B1. Let Me Be Me (ツッチー Rare Remix) B2. Let Me Be Me (ツッチー Midium Rare Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1965, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Dillinja-Fluid-Hard-Noize/", "title": "Dillinja – Fluid Hard Noize", "body": "This is a track that every drum & bass fan will love. What no one understood was how the song”s “Reese” sound, a whirring synthesizer sound, was created. It was probably processed by the E-MU sampler”s Z-plane filter. This Reese sound was used on a variety of tracks, including “Nasty Ways,” “Take My Life,” “Love Is Not a Game Remix,” and “Bambaata Remix,” and variations of it were also used on “Tudor Rose” and “Go Dillinja.” It’s no exaggeration to say that this Reese sound is probably the coolest drum & bass sound ever created. And it seems crazy to think that back in 1998, during the airwaves of Britpop, someone like Dillinja was underground, completely unconcerned about selling records, and was producing cooler stuff. Tracklist A. Hard Noize AA. Fluid Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1966, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Dieselboy-The-Directors-Cut/", "title": "Dieselboy – The Director\"s Cut", "body": "This is a rare tape of a killer tech modish drum and bass mix by Diesel Boy, a DJ who is overwhelmingly talented and popular in the US drum and bass scene. This mix is ​​also great, with timing, EQ, levels, and transitions all on point, a great example of his skills. It”s a mix that you”ll want to listen to again and again forever. Tracklist A. Side A 1. ???? (Intro written by Dieselboy?) 2. Ram Trilogy- Intercity 3. Facs- Cazms 4. Known:Unknown- Chaos Edit 5. Ram Trilogy- No Reality remix 6. Ed Rush + Optical- Lifecrisis (Origin Unknown remix) 7. Jonny L + Optical- Viper 8. Dylan- Blackout 9. Facs- Dekweef 10. Ed Rush + Optical- Wormhole 11. A Sides- Calibre (Ed Rush remix) 12. ???? 13. Ram Trilogy- Mind Overload 14. Adam F- Brand New Funk B. Side B 1. Grooverider - Cybernetic Jazz 2. Ed Rush + Optical- Point Blank 3. Grooverider- Imagination 4. Adam F- Dirty Harry (Ganja Kru remix) 5. ???? 6. DJ Die- Clear Skyz 7. Ed Rush + Optical- Slip Thru 8. Ram Trilogy- Chase Scene 9. Decoder- Stash 10. Jonny L- Uneasy 11. Orgy- Blue Monday (Optical Dub mix) 12. Ed..." }, { "id": 1967, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Cristian-Vogel-Whipaspank/", "title": "Cristian Vogel – Whipaspank", "body": "Christian Vogel (born 1972 in Santiago, Chile) is an experimental electronic musician who began composing electronic music with Cabbage Head Collective in the late 1980s. He attended the University of Sussex, studying with Martin Butler (composer) and Jonathan Harvey (composer), where he gained a degree in 20th century music. A founding member of the No Future Collective, active in Brighton in the mid-1990s. Tracklist A1. Whipaspank A2. Whipaspank (Cylob Mix) B. Whipaspank (Tube Jerk Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1968, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-Urban-Acid/", "title": "Various – Urban Acid", "body": "“Various – Urban Acid” is This is an acid house compilation album released by the UK label “Urban” in 1988. Tracklist A1. Perfectly Ordinary People–Theme From P.O.P. A2. Charm–Housegirl (Club Mix) A3. Pozitiv Noize–Africa A4. Charm–Predator (Scare) B1. The Party Boy–The Twilight Zone (U.K. Edit) B2. Funkacidic–S.O.L.T. B3. The Candy Man–The Candy Man B4. Charm–Walk On The Wild Side Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1969, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-Extravagance-II-E.P/", "title": "Various – Extravagance II E.P", "body": "“Adrenalin” and “I Think I Want Some More” are songs from 1992 and are timeless tracks. Tracks from this EP were also featured on Basement Phil’s History of Rave show. Tracklist A1. Jargon–Adrenalin A2. Auto-Logic–I Think I Want Some More B1. The Coma Kid–1000 Feet B2. Ray Vee–R.V. Theme Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1970, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Susumu-Yokota-Zero-Remixes-EP-Vol.-2/", "title": "Susumu Yokota – Zero Remixes EP Vol.2", "body": "Remix cut Vol. 2 from Susumu Yokota”s masterpiece “Zero” released by Sublime Records in 2001 includes a remix by Kyoto Jazz Massive for “Feel My Love” and Susumu Yokota”s own mix for Hallelujah. Tracklist A1. Feel My Love (Kyoto Jazz Massive Mix) A2. Hallelujah (Susumu Yokota Mix) B1. Could Heaven Ever Be Like This (Malawi Rocks Mix Vocal) B2. Could Heaven Ever Be Like This (Malawi Rocks Mix Instrumental) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1971, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Resistance-D-Dreams-EP/", "title": "Resistance D – Dreams EP", "body": "“Dreams EP” is an EP by Resistance D released in 1992 on the label Direct Drive. A style that combines hard trance and melodiousness. Tracklist A1. Cosmic Love A2. Emphasis B1. Eclipse B2. Index Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1972, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Radioactive-Goldfish-L.S.D.-Is-The-Bomb/", "title": "Radioactive Goldfish – L.S.D. Is The Bomb", "body": "“LSD Is The Bomb” is a great approach to the ‘91 European techno sound, combining aggressive Belgian riffs with sharper, more precise German rhythms. Many North American artists use plenty of vocal samples, but “LSD Is The Bomb” keeps them from becoming too cheap. Additionally, this track has the most devastating key change in the middle. It’s truly diabolical. Definitely worth checking out for fans of the old school rave sound of ‘90-‘92. Tracklist A1. L.S.D Is The Bomb A2. L.S.D Is The Bomb (Dub #1) B1. Electrode B2. L.S.D Is The Bomb (Dub #2) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1973, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Mauro-Picotto-and-Riccardo-Ferri-Alchemist-EP/", "title": "Mauro Picotto & Riccardo Ferri –Alchemist EP", "body": "“New Time, New Place” was a huge hit in both techno and British hard dance clubs. The other songs are pretty solid techno, and “Pandoro” is a pretty fun track. As the track develops along with the hard beat, it creates a nice, gentle sound. It’s like Mauro Picot, old style and new style. Tracklist A. New Time, New Place B. Codebreaker C. Alchemist D. Pandoro Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1974, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Ken-Laszlo-Tonight/", "title": "Ken Laszlo – Tonight", "body": "「Ken Laszlo - Tonight」は、イタリアのイタロディスコアーティスト、ケン・ラズロ（Ken Laszlo）の1985年リリースの楽曲です。 ケン・ラズロは、イタロディスコムーブメントの中で活躍したアーティストであり、「Tonight」は彼の代表作の一つとされています。 「Tonight」は、ダンサブルなビート、キャッチーなメロディ、エネルギッシュなボーカルが特徴のディスコ・ポップ曲で、洗練されたサウンドとキャッチーなリフレインは、当時のディスコシーンで人気を集めました。 Tracklist A1. Tonight (Factory Team Edit) A2. Tonight (Original Edit '94){: .button1} B1. Tonight (Club Mix) B2. Me And You メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1975, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/DJ-Pierre-We-Gonna-Funk/", "title": "DJ Pierre – We Gonna Funk", "body": "This record, released in 1993 by the UK label Solid Pleasure, includes “We Gonna Funk ((Underground Mix)”). Incorporating elements of Nightcrawlers” “Push the Feeling On,” this track is a great mix that”s even better than the original. Tracklist A1. We Gonna Funk (P&C's 9am Ultimate Mix) Remix – P&C Remix, Producer – Craig Daniel Michael Yefet, Paul Newman A2. We Gonna Funk (DJ Pierre's Original Mix) AA1. Together In Wonderland (DJ Demand Re-mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1977, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Atari-Teenage-Riot-Revolution-Action-E.P/", "title": "Atari Teenage Riot – Revolution Action E.P.", "body": "“Atari Teenage Riot - Revolution Action E.P.” is a song released in 1999 by the German digital hardcore band Atari Teenage Riot. Trashy Whore (Lars-Christian Müller Remix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1979, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Sukia-Gary-Super-Macho/", "title": "Sukia – Gary Super Macho", "body": "This is a trip hop song released by Mo Wax in 1997. Sukia is an American electronic music band based in Camarillo, California, USA, featuring former child actor Ross Harris, who appeared in shows such as CHiPS and Little House in the 1970s. Formed in the early 1990s within Los Angeles’ expanding indie music scene, they took their name from the Italian vampire comic book of the same name. Tracklist A1. Barry Super Macho (Dust Brothers Remix) A2. Gary Super Macho (The Dirty Sanchez Mix)Remix– DJ Me DJ You B1. Gary Super Macho (Major Force West Remix) B2. Gary Super Macho (Single Edit) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1980, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Sam-Harris-Holding-On/", "title": "Sam Harris – Holding On", "body": "“Sam Harris – Holding On” is a 1999 release by Junior Vasquez, remixing the title song by Samuel Kent Harris. Remix – Junior Vasquez Tracklist A. Holding On (Junior's Circuit Mix) B. Holding On (Junior's Ambient Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1981, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Fresh-Lab-Afrodisiacs-EP/", "title": "Fresh Lab – Afrodisiacs EP", "body": "Afrodisiacs EP is an EP by the unit “Fresh Lab” by Jeff Flambeau & Stéphane Dupoup, released in 1995 on the French label “Yellow Productions”. Tracklist A. L'Angoisse B1. Ombre B2. Sentiments Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1982, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Claude-Young-The-Dexit-E.P/", "title": "Claude Young – The Dexit E.P.", "body": "“The Dexit E.P.” was released by Claude Young on the Belgian label Elypsia in 1997 to release the work of producers from his hometown of Detroit. Tracklist A1. Intro A2. Dexit B1. Prance B2. Fade Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1983, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Charly-Lownoise-Mental-Theo-Wonderfull-Days/", "title": "Charly Lownoise Mental Theo – Wonderfull Days", "body": "This song is known as a Dutch happy hardcore classic released in 1994. Charly Lownoise and Mental Theo are a Dutch DJ and producer duo who achieved great success in the Eurodance and happy hardcore scenes of the 1990s. “Wonderfull Days” is played at many clubs and rave events, and is loved by many for its catchy melody and positive energy. “Wonderfull Days” remains a classic of the happy hardcore scene. Tracklist A1. Wonderfull Days (Rotterdam Mix) B1. Wonderfull Days (Trance Mix) B2. Wonderfull Days (Radio Mix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1984, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Booka-Shade-In-White-Rooms-(Vinyl-Two)/", "title": "Booka Shade – In White Rooms (Vinyl Two)", "body": "“Booka Shade - In White Rooms (Vinyl Two)” is a song by the German electronic duo Booka Shade. Released in 2005, this song was one of Booka Shade’s signature works and became a major success in their career. A heavy bass line, synthesizer melody, and resonant rhythm combine to create a house music song that incorporates elements of electronic music, giving it a dark and mysterious atmosphere. Tracklist a. In White Rooms (Mexico Mix) b. In White Rooms (Shinedoe Fusion Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1985, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Billy-Nightmare-Reality-Check/", "title": "Billy Nightmare – Reality Check", "body": "This is an EP by “Mystic Bill” Torres, also known as Billy Nightmare, who emerged from the Chicago rave scene. Originally, the project was going to be titled “Billy’s Nightmare,” but to avoid a lifetime of bad luck, Torres decided to switch it up to Billy Nightmare, put aside his Mystic Bill alias, cut his hair, changed his sound, and assumed this new persona. Reality Check contains four tracks recorded at Chicago’s Mirage Studios in 1996. The two tracks on side A have dark beats that cast a shadow over your head for a while. The B-side features two versions of the same song, both showing the versatility Mystic Bill is capable of producing. All songs were remastered by George Horn at Fantasy Studios. Tracklist A1. I've Seen The World A2. Is This The Life For Me B1. Dance,Shake,Swing B2. Dance... Version 2 Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1986, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Andreas-Saag-Jazz-Lesson/", "title": "Andreas Saag – Jazz Lesson", "body": "2002年にスウェーデンのレーベル「SLS」からリリースされました。 SLSのトレードマークサウンドとは驚くほど異なり、Saagが美しく壮大なピアノを中心にした素晴らしいトラックを提供しているジャズです。 Tracklist A. Get It On B1. Hold It Back B2. Release The Groove Saxophone – Paul Lachenardière メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1987, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Aaron-Spectre-Amen,-Punk/", "title": "Aaron Spectre – Amen, Punk", "body": "Aaron Specter is an American producer, DJ, and artist known for his work that blends drum and bass and jungle-based sounds with unique punk and hardcore elements. 「Amen, Punk」というタイトルからも分かるように、彼の音楽はアメンブレイク（Amen Break）と呼ばれるドラムンベースの基礎となるサンプルパターンを取り入れつつ、パンクやハードコアのエネルギーと荒々しさを表現しています。 Tracklist A. 1600 Penn, FTW B1. Pay To Cum VIP B2. You Don't Know Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1988, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/sadistic-mika-band-kurofune/", "title": "Sadistic Mika Band – Kurofune", "body": "「サディスティック・ミカ・バンド」は、1970年代に活躍した日本のロックバンドであり、「黒船」は、1974年にリリースされたサディスティック・ミカ・バンドの2ndアルバムです。 サディスティック・ミカ・バンド独特のポップなメロディが特徴で、当時の若者たちに大きな影響を与え、日本のロックシーンにおける名曲として広く知られています。 サディスティック・ミカ・バンドの音楽は今でも多くの人々に愛され続けており、日本のロックの黎明期を彩る重要な存在として評価されています。 Tracklist 1.墨絵の国へ 2.何かが海をやってくる 3.タイムマシンにおねがい 4.黒船(嘉永6年6月2日) 5.黒船(嘉永6年6月3日) 6.黒船(嘉永6年6月4日) 7.よろしくどうぞ 8.どんたく 9.四季頌歌 10.塀までひとっとび 11.颱風歌 12.さようなら メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 1989, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Various-We-Are-Reasonable-People/", "title": "Various – We Are Reasonable People", "body": "Music Week gave the album a positive review, saying, “It will definitely appeal to existing fans and is a good introduction for those interested in underground sounds.” \"”Brainwashed’’ also ranks third among 1998 compilation albums. Close Shaves Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1993, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Spiritualized-Ladies-And-Gentlemen-We-Are-Floating-In-Space/", "title": "Spiritualized – Ladies And Gentlemen We Are Floating In Space", "body": "“Spiritualized – Ladies And Gentlemen We Are Floating In Space” is an album by the British rock band Spiritualized. This album is known as Spiritualized’s masterpiece, and is characterized by its experimental sound and magnificent arrangements. The album is known for its unique musical style, combining elements of rock, shoegaze, and psychedelic rock. Spiritualized was formed in Rugby, Warwickshire, England in 1990, and aside from core member Jason Pearce, the group has always had a fluid supporting cast. They are also recognized as one of the bands that had a major influence on alternative rock and indie rock from the 1990s onwards. The band’s name comes from the fictional spaceship “Spiritualized” that appears in the movie 2001: A Space Odyssey, and Jason Pearce is also known as the former vocalist of Spacemen 3. Tracklist 1.Ladies And Gentlemen We Are Floating In Space 2.Come Together 3.I Think I'm In Love 4.All Of My Thoughts 5.Stay With Me 6.Electricity 7.Home Of The Brave 8.The Individual 9.Broken Heart 10.No God Only Religion 11.Cool Waves 12.Cop Shoot Cop Bonus Track For Japan 13.Broken Heart (Instrumental) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 1994, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Slam-Rejuvination-Eterna-I.B.O/", "title": "Slam Rejuvination – Eterna I.B.O.", "body": "by Slam Rejuvination “I.B.O.” is a great track. Eterna and its covers have been known for years and are good songs, but “I.B.O.” is a special track. Tracklist A. Slam–Eterna AA. Rejuvination–I.B.O. This album is a reissue of Les Masque’s 1969 collaboration with the Brazilian jazz trio LE TRIO CAMARA. It is known as a masterpiece of bossa nova, with a unique rhythmic feel and cheerful atmosphere that incorporates the rhythms, melodies, and percussion of Brazilian music. Tracklist 1. Echo 2. Il Faut Tenir 3. Un Regard... Un Sourire... 4. Enfer 5. Bal Chez Le Baron 6. La Grosse Bosse A Casanova 7. Mais Un Jour... 8. Initiation 9. Dis Nous Quel Est Le Chemin 10. L'Oiseau 11. This album, released by R & S Records, is one of his masterpieces. “Innerelements” was released in 1994 and is known as a piece of techno music that incorporates elements of trip-hop and electronica. Featuring ambient soundscapes and downtempo rhythms, its innovative approach made a strong impression on many listeners. Tracklist 1. Encoding 2. A.F.I.A.C. 3. Ricochet 4. Twist Of Space 5. Flurry 6. Optigan 2. Space Interval 1 3. Marionette 59 Sec Sting 4. Carousel 5. Bossa Nova Supernova 6. The Shapeshifter 7. Funky Duck 8. Marionette 9. Departure Lounge 10. The Dream Sequence 11. This album was released in 2004. “Medúlla” is a highly experimental and innovative work by Björk, and is known as a vocal album centered on the human voice. Björk uses the human voice and the sounds of the human body in most of her songs, building her sound without relying on traditional instruments. Track A2 typo: Artist is misspelled as “Grandmaster Flash” instead of the original “Grandmaster Flash & The Furious Five.” Songwriter error on track B4: Credit is incorrectly written as “Treacherous Three” instead of “Doug E. Fresh”. Artist error on track B5: The artist is incorrectly listed as “Treacherous Three” instead of the original “Treacherous Three featuring Spoonie Gee.” Incorrect artist description for track B6: The artist is labeled as “Funky Four & One” instead of the original “Funky 4 + 1.” The following songs are also included as bonus tracks, but are not included on the CD. Tracks B5 to B6 Tracks D6 to D9 Tracklist A1.The Packman–I'm The Packman A2.Grandmaster Flash & The Furious Five–Superappin A3.Spoonie Gee And Treacherous Three–Love Rap A4.Treacherous Three–Body Rock A5.Treacherous Three–At The Party A6.The Fearless Four–It's Magic A7.Disco Four–Move With The Groove A8.Grandmaster Flash & The Furious Five–Superappin # 2 B1.The Masterdon Committee–Funk Box Party B2.Treacherous Three–Feel The Heart Beat B3.The Fearless Four–Rockin' It B4.Doug E. What Sounds!” Track 9 (Part I) recorded November 6, 1953 · From a Capitol Records single Track 9 (Part II) recorded May 2, 1961 · From the album “Staged For Stereo - Highlights” Track 10 recorded March 23, 1960 · From the album “Accent On Bamboo” Track 11 recorded March 23, 1959 · From the album “Les Baxter’s Wild Guitars” Track 12 recorded August 4, 1949 · From the album “Music For Piece Of Mind” Track 13 recorded c. 1959 · From the album “Felix Slatkin Conducts Fantastic Percussion!” Track 14 recorded c. 1963 · From the album..." }, { "id": 2012, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Beatnuts-World-Famous-Classics-1993-1998/", "title": "The Beatnuts –World Famous Classics 1993-1998", "body": "“The Beatnuts – World Famous Classics 1993-1998” (World Famous Classics 1993-1998){: .button1} is a compilation album and best-of album by the hip-hop group Beatnuts. The Beatnuts, made up of producer and rappers Psycho Les and JuJu, gained attention in the 1990s with their unique production style and witty lyrics. This album features popular songs and influential tracks from The Beatnuts’ early years. Tracklist 1.World's Famous 2.Bless The M.I.C. 3.Props Over Here (Remix) 4.Here's A Drink 5.No Equal 6.Find That 7.No Equal (Remix) 8.Psycho Dwarf 9.Do You Believe? 10.Props Over Here 11.Get Funky (Remix) 12.Reign Of The Tec 13.Get Funky 14.Give Me Tha Ass Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 2013, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/The-Beatnuts-Take-It-Or-Squeeze-It/", "title": "The Beatnuts – Take It Or Squeeze It", "body": "“The Beatnuts – Take It Or Squeeze It” is the fourth studio album by the hip hop group The Beatnuts. Released in 2001, this album showcases The Beatnuts’ signature production style and witty lyrics. ‘Take It Or Squeeze It’ is built around upbeat, funky tracks that incorporate various musical elements and samples. On this album, The Beatnuts develop their own unique sound, deftly incorporating elements of hip-hop, funk, and Latin music. Tracklist 1.Intro 2.It's Da Nuts 3.Prendelo (Light It Up) 4.Contact 5.Yo Yo Yo 6.If It Ain't Gangsta 7.No Escapin' This 8.Who's Comin Wit Da Shit Na 9.Let's Git Doe 10.Hood Thang 11.Hammer Time 12.U Don't Want It 13.Mayonnaise 14.Se Acabo (Remix) Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 2014, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Sven-Vath-Fusion/", "title": "Sven Vath – Fusion", "body": "“Sven Väth - Fusion” is an album by German techno DJ and producer Sven Väth. He is a very important figure in the techno music scene and has had a long and successful career. “Fusion” is an album full of powerful beats, groovy rhythms, and dreamy soundscapes. The album features original tracks and remixes that reflect their unique style and talent. His DJ skills and production abilities combine to create a unique and dynamic world of techno music. Tracklist 1. Fusion 2. Discophon 3. Sensual Enjoyments 4. Augenblick 5. Scorpio's Movement 6. Trippy Moonshine 7. Face It 8. Schubdüse 9. Sounds Control Your Mind 10. Blue Spliff Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 2015, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Rodrigo-Y-Gabriela-1111/", "title": "Rodrigo Y Gabriela – 1111", "body": "Rodrigo y Gabriela is a guitar duo from Mexico. “11:11” is an album released by Rodrigo y Gabriela in 2009, expressing rhythm, melody, and harmony using only their signature acoustic guitar. Their original songs and covers of other artists are included, with elements of Latin American rhythms and flamenco present, as well as influences from rock and jazz. Their unique performance style and passionate expressiveness made a strong impression on the audience. Rodrigo y Gabriela has developed a wide range of musical activities and has gained international acclaim. Tracklist CD1. Hanuman CD2. Buster Voodoo CD3. Triveni CD4. Logos CD5. Santa Domingo CD6. Released in 1999, it is a work that fuses electronic sounds and ambient elements, developing the dreamy soundscape that is the hallmark of Nobukazu Takemura”s music. Tracklist A. Meteor B. This song is included on their debut album “D-D-Don’t Stop the Beat”, released in 2002. “Hey Hey My My Yo Yo” is an uptempo, catchy pop song with an upbeat melody, danceable beat, and playful lyrics. Junior Senior’s music is known for its pop compositions, incorporating elements of dance-pop and disco. “Hey Hey My My Yo Yo” is one of Junior Senior’s most famous songs and became a worldwide hit. Tracklist 1.Hello 2.Hip Hop Lula 3.Can I Get Get Get 4.Take My Time 5.Itch U Can't Skratch 6.We R The Handclaps 7.I Like Music (W.O.S.B.) 8.Ur A Girl 9.No No No's 10.Dance, Chance, Romance 11.Happy Rap 12.Hey Hey My My Yo Yo Recording Diary Purchase on Mercari Youtube" }, { "id": 2019, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Jungle-Brothers-Jungllenium-Remixes/", "title": "Jungle Brothers – Jungllenium Remixes", "body": "「Jungllenium Remixes」は、Jungle Brothersの楽曲をさまざまなプロデューサーやリミキサーがリミックスした作品集です。 Tracklist 1. Ultimatum Ultramix - The Mega Mix Of \"Straight Out The Jungle\" 2. V.I.P. (Wiseguys Mix) 3. Get Down (Bronx Dogs Mix) 4. Because I Got It Like That (Ultimatum Mix) 5. Black Is Black (Ultimatum Remix) 6. Because I Got It Like That (Freestylers Indett Mix) 7. Jungle Brother (Urban Takeover Mix) 8. Freakin' You (Caribbean Sunshine Remix) 9. Brain (Refugee Camp Mix) 10. Jungle Brother (Afrika Mix) 11. How Ya Want It We Got It (Native Tongues Remix) 12. Brain (Da Beatminerz Mix) 13. Straight Out The Jungle (Soul Shock Remix) メルカリで購入 Youtube" }, { "id": 2020, "url": "https://monumental-movement.jp/en/Hoodlum-Priest-Heart-Of-Darkness/", "title": "Hoodlum Priest – Heart Of Darkness", "body": "“Heart of Darkness” is a song that stands out among Fudrum Priest’s works. Hudrum Priest is the project of UK musician Derek Thompson. His music is experimental, incorporating elements from various genres, and is characterized by dark atmospheres and experimental soundscapes. As the name suggests, “Heart of Darkness” is a song that deals with the inner conflicts and depths of darkness, and the progression of the song is full of tension, combining eerie sound effects and heavy rhythms. The lyrics explore deep, introspective content in keeping with dark themes. “Heart of Darkness” is an album that truly embodies Fudrum Priest’s unique musical style and artistic expression. Tracklist 1. Introduction To The Heart Of Darkness 2. Rock Drill 3. Tyrell 4. C Horse 5. Caucasian 6. Sex Spirit 7. The Walker 8. Talk Dirty 9. Deep Dance 10.
